title: Arbor: Tree Search as a Cognition Layer for Autonomous Agents
summary:
Arbor is a multi-agent framework that introduces structured tree search as a cognition layer for autonomous agents operating in large, stateful action spaces. Prior autonomous optimization systems operate on isolated targets with stateless evaluation. Arbor instead maintains an explicit search tree of scored hypotheses that serves as the shared working memory across agents, evolving with every measurement, treating failures as diagnostic signal that reshapes subsequent exploration, and expanding as prior successes shift the bottleneck distribution.
  We validate Arbor on full-stack LLM inference optimization, a domain where achieving peak performance has historically required coordinated effort from engineering teams across the application, framework, compiler, kernel, and hardware stack. Arbor pairs an Orchestrator agent, which drives optimization by delegating to Domain Specialists across the inference stack, with a Critic agent that safeguards stability through root-cause analysis, introspection, and measurement validation -- a checks-and-balances architecture where neither agent can unilaterally drive the system. Agent capabilities are decomposed into hard skills (domain expertise) and soft skills (coordination protocols that determine how contributions compose), enabling fully autonomous multi-day campaigns. Arbor achieves up to 193% inference throughput-latency Pareto improvement over vendor-optimized baselines, while a single agent without the harness plateaus at +33% throughput improvement and crashes irrecoverably within hours. Arbor generalizes to multiple generations of hardware platform, and run-to-run variance is within 2 percentage points demonstrating that the method is hardware-agnostic and reproducible.

AI.tldr: Arbor是一个多智能体框架，通过结构化树搜索作为认知层，结合Orchestrator和Critic双智能体制衡架构，在全栈LLM推理优化中实现高达193%的吞吐量-延迟Pareto改进，且硬件无关、可复现。
AI.motivation: 现有自主优化系统仅针对孤立目标且基于无状态评估，缺乏在大型、有状态动作空间中进行协同探索的能力；全栈LLM推理优化历来依赖跨应用、框架、编译器、内核和硬件栈的工程团队协调，亟需一种能够有效协调多领域专家智能体并利用失败信号引导探索的自动化框架。
AI.method: Arbor构建一个显式的带评分假设搜索树作为所有智能体的共享工作记忆，随每次测量演化；采用Orchestrator与Critic双智能体制衡架构，Orchestrator驱动优化并委派领域专家，Critic通过根因分析、内省和测量验证维护稳定性；智能体能力分解为硬技能（领域专长）和软技能（协调协议），实现完全自主的多日优化。
AI.result: Arbor在LLM推理优化中实现高达193%的吞吐量-延迟Pareto改进，远超供应商优化基线；无框架支撑的单智能体仅实现33%吞吐量提升并在数小时内崩溃且无法恢复；方法跨多代硬件平台泛化，运行间方差在2个百分点以内，表明其硬件无关且可复现。
AI.conclusion: 结构化树搜索作为多智能体共享认知层能够有效处理大规模有状态动作空间的自主优化问题；制衡架构（Checks-and-Balances）可防止单智能体驱动导致的系统崩溃；将智能体能力分解为硬技能与软技能使得复杂跨栈优化任务可完全自主执行，且该方法具有硬件通用性和可复现性。

title: Strategic Decision Support for AI Agents
summary: Traditionally, decision support studies how humans use machine learning models to make better decisions. In modern agentic systems, this division of roles is increasingly reversed: AI agents act on behalf of users, while humans and tools becomes support mechanisms around them. This role reversal brings reliability concerns to the forefront, since agentic errors can be consequential and agent behavior must remain aligned with human goals and constraints. Departing from the classical view of decision support, we revisit its two basic principles, the cost--value tradeoff of seeking support and the role of uncertainty quantification, in a setting where AI agents are the central actors. We propose a framework for strategic decision support for AI agents through an optimization problem that minimizes support usage subject to controlling a counterfactual missed-support error: the probability that the agent acts alone on instances where support would have materially improved its output. At the population level, we show that the optimal policy is a threshold rule on the value of support. Building on this structure, we develop an online algorithm that adaptively thresholds such a score and uses randomized exploration to control missed-support error without distributional assumptions. We further introduce a calibration-on-the-fly method that reduces unnecessary support calls online. We instantiate this framework across diverse scenarios, including information gathering, human--AI collaboration, and tool use, showing how each can be modeled through the same strategic decision-support lens. Experiments across these settings show that our method reliably controls the target error while substantially reducing support usage in practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向AI智能体的策略性决策支持框架，通过优化问题最小化支持使用量，同时控制反事实遗漏支持误差，并开发了在线自适应阈值算法和即时校准方法，在信息收集、人机协作和工具使用等场景中可靠地控制目标误差并大幅减少不必要的支持调用。
AI.motivation: 传统决策支持研究聚焦于人类如何借助机器学习模型做出更好决策，但在现代智能体系统中角色发生逆转——AI智能体代表用户行动，人类和工具成为辅助机制。这种角色反转带来了可靠性问题，智能体的错误可能产生严重后果，且其行为必须与人类目标和约束保持一致。因此，需要重新审视决策支持的基本原理（支持的成本-价值权衡以及不确定性量化的作用），以适应当AI智能体作为核心行动者的新范式。
AI.method: 本文提出一个面向AI智能体的策略性决策支持框架，通过一个优化问题来最小化支持使用量，同时控制反事实遗漏支持误差（即智能体在缺乏支持时单独行动、而支持本可实质改善其输出的概率）。在总体层面证明最优策略是支持价值上的阈值规则。基于此结构，开发了一种在线自适应阈值算法，通过随机探索在无需分布假设的情况下控制遗漏支持误差；进一步引入即时校准方法，在线减少不必要的支持调用。
AI.result: 该框架被实例化于信息收集、人机协作和工具使用等多种场景中，实验表明该方法能够可靠地控制目标误差，同时在实际中大幅减少支持使用量。
AI.conclusion: 本文从根本上逆转了决策支持的传统视角，将AI智能体而非人类作为决策支持的核心对象，为构建更可靠、资源高效的自主智能体系统提供了新的理论框架和实用算法。

title: PersonaDrive: Human-Style Retrieval-Augmented VLA Agents for Closed-Loop Driving Simulation
summary: Closed-loop driving simulators typically populate their environments with non-ego traffic agents that behave largely the same way, produced either by rule-based traffic managers or by learned models trained toward a single behavioral mode. Recent work introduces style variation through post-hoc labels on observational data or LLM-inferred reward weights, but these signals act as proxies for what a style should reward rather than demonstrations of humans explicitly asked to drive in that style. We introduce PersonaDrive, a pipeline that conditions a vision-language-action (VLA) driving agent on retrieved demonstrations from a style-instructed human driving dataset, in which participants drive CARLA leaderboard routes under aggressive, neutral, and conservative instructions on a driver-in-the-loop rig. The pipeline has three stages: (i) offline triplet mining over per-style human driving data using a combined image-text similarity score; (ii) training a lightweight retrieval head that fuses frozen visual features with a small control encoder over per-style databases; and (iii) fine-tuning a single VLA backbone to treat retrieved context points as in-context behavioral demonstrations during waypoint prediction. At inference, the same backbone is conditioned on any style by swapping which per-style database the retrieval head queries, so selecting a style requires no per-style retraining while enabling human-style, style-diverse non-ego agents for closed-loop simulation. On Bench2Drive, PersonaDrive (no style) improves the driving score by 4.6% over SimLingo and 2.5% over HiP-AD, and under style conditioning attains the highest driving score in every style within a roughly 2% band (its weakest style surpassing the strongest baseline, DMW, by 5.4%), while average speed and acceleration rise by 18% and 25% from the conservative to the aggressive instruction.

AI.tldr: PersonaDrive 提出一种基于风格指令的人类驾驶数据集和检索增强的视觉-语言-动作框架，通过少样本上下文演示实现驾驶风格的条件化控制，无需针对每种风格重新训练，在 Bench2Drive 上达到最优驾驶分数。
AI.motivation: 现有闭环驾驶模拟器中的非自车交通智能体行为模式单一，要么基于规则、要么基于单模式学习的模型；已有的风格变异方法依赖事后标签或 LLM 推断的奖励权重作为风格代理信号，而非来自被明确要求以特定风格驾驶的人类演示，缺乏真实的人类风格驾驶数据支撑。
AI.method: PersonaDrive 是一个三阶段流水线：(i) 使用图像-文本联合相似度对风格指令下的人类驾驶数据进行离线三元组挖掘；(ii) 训练一个轻量级检索头，融合冻结的视觉特征与小型控制编码器，构建各风格的检索数据库；(iii) 微调单一 VLA 骨干网络，将检索到的上下文点作为少样本行为演示进行路径点预测；推理时通过切换检索数据库实现风格条件化，无需每风格重新训练。
AI.result: 在 Bench2Drive 上，无风格条件下 PersonaDrive 驾驶分数比 SimLingo 提升 4.6%、比 HiP-AD 提升 2.5%；风格条件下每种风格均取得最高驾驶分数，且最弱风格仍超过最强基线 DMW 达 5.4%；从保守到激进指令，平均速度和加速度分别上升 18% 和 25%。
AI.conclusion: PersonaDrive 证实了基于真实人类风格驾驶演示的检索增强方法能够有效实现驾驶风格的条件化控制，无需每风格重新训练即可生成风格多样的非自车智能体，为闭环模拟中更真实、多样的交通行为生成提供了可行路径。

title: TrajGenAgent: A Hierarchical LLM Agent for Human Mobility Trajectory Generation
comment: 14 pages, 2 figures, 8 tables. Accepted by the 27th IEEE International Conference on Mobile Data Management (MDM 2026)
summary: Human mobility data is important for transportation, urban planning, and epidemic control, but large-scale trajectory collection is often costly and privacy-constrained, motivating realistic synthetic trajectory generation. Existing LLM-based generators typically rely on either prompt engineering, which preserves zero-shot reasoning but lacks fine-grained spatiotemporal grounding, or trajectory-level fine-tuning, which improves statistical precision but incurs substantial computational cost and may weaken general reasoning. We propose TrajGenAgent, a semantic-aware hierarchical LLM-agent framework for human mobility trajectory generation without model fine-tuning. TrajGenAgent uses a two-stage orchestrator-worker design: an LLM first synthesizes an individual- and weekday-conditioned activity chain from historical evidence via in-context learning, and a deterministic workflow then grounds each activity into a complete visit using personalized POI retrieval, distance-aware location selection, kinematics-aware travel-time propagation, and LLM-based duration estimation. To evaluate realism beyond aggregate spatiotemporal statistics, we introduce an anomaly-detection-based evaluation framework using two complementary detectors to assess behavioral and semantic plausibility. Experiments on benchmark and large-scale simulation datasets show that TrajGenAgent improves spatiotemporal fidelity, semantic coherence, and individual-specific behavioral realism over representative neural and LLM-based baselines, while avoiding parameter updates.

AI.tldr: TrajGenAgent 提出了一种语义感知的分层 LLM 智能体框架，通过无需微调的两阶段编排器-工作者设计，结合上下文学习与确定性工作流，生成具有高时空保真度、语义一致性和个体行为真实感的人类移动轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有人类移动轨迹生成方法存在两难：基于提示工程的 LLM 生成器虽保留零样本推理能力但缺乏细粒度时空 grounding，而轨迹级微调虽提升统计精度却计算成本高昂且可能削弱通用推理能力，因此亟需一种无需模型微调、兼顾语义推理与时空精确性的轨迹生成框架。
AI.method: TrajGenAgent 采用两阶段编排器-工作者设计：首先由 LLM 通过上下文学习从历史证据中合成个体和星期几条件化的活动链，随后通过确定性工作流将每个活动落地为完整访问，具体包括个性化 POI 检索、距离感知位置选择、运动学感知旅行时间传播和 LLM 驱动的时长估计；此外还引入基于异常检测的评估框架，使用两个互补检测器评估行为和语义合理性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集和大规模仿真数据集上的实验表明，TrajGenAgent 在时空保真度、语义一致性以及个体特定行为真实感方面均优于代表性神经方法和基于 LLM 的基线模型，且无需任何参数更新。
AI.conclusion: TrajGenAgent 通过分层智能体设计有效解耦了高层语义推理与底层时空 grounding，为无需微调的 LLM 轨迹生成提供了可行范式，其异常检测评估框架也为超越传统聚合统计指标的行为真实性评估提供了新视角。

title: Does AI Reviewer See the Full Picture? Attacking and Defending Multimodal Peer Review
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026, Project Page: https://paper-guard.github.io/
summary: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) into scientific peer-review workflows introduces novel and significant risks for adversarial manipulation, especially given the multimodal nature of scientific papers where figures, not just text, convey core evidence. This creates a significant gap: current robustness studies on AI peer-review are overwhelmingly text-only. Moreover, the problem is distinct from standard jailbreaking, as a peer-review attack seeks to induce a domain-specific, targeted failure (e.g., "inflate this score") rather than a general safety policy violation, for which no practical defenses exist. To address this, we introduce PaperGuard, the first comprehensive benchmark designed to systematically evaluate and defend AI-generated peer-review against these domain-specific, cross-modal attacks. Our framework is built on three pillars: (1) a new multimodal peer-review dataset spanning multiple scientific domains; (2) a unified suite of attacks, including black-box prompt injections and white-box perturbations, specifically designed to target both text (GCG) and figures (PGD); and (3) a practical defense, motivated by the long-context challenge of academic papers, that uses chunk-based embedding search to efficiently localize and mitigate harmful instructions. Our extensive experiments, conducted across state-of-the-art models, confirm that AI reviewers are pervasively vulnerable. PaperGuard establishes the foundational benchmark, protocols, and actionable defense necessary to pioneer trustworthy, attack-resilient AI-assisted scholarly reviewing.

AI.tldr: PaperGuard 是首个系统性评估和防御针对 AI 同行评审的跨模态对抗攻击的基准框架，揭示了多模态大模型在科学评审中普遍存在的脆弱性，并提出了基于分块嵌入搜索的实用防御方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对 AI 同行评审的鲁棒性评估几乎完全局限于纯文本场景，忽视了科学论文中图表等多模态信息带来的对抗攻击风险；同时，针对同行评审的领域特定目标攻击（如操控评分）与通用越狱攻击本质不同，且缺乏有效的防御机制。
AI.method: PaperGuard 框架包含三个核心部分：(1) 构建涵盖多个科学领域的多模态同行评审数据集；(2) 设计统一的攻击套件，包括面向文本的黑盒提示注入（GCG）和面向图像的白盒扰动（PGD）；(3) 提出一种基于分块嵌入搜索的实用防御方法，利用学术论文的长上下文特性，通过分块检索高效定位并消除有害指令。
AI.result: 在多个最先进模型上的大量实验表明，AI 评审者普遍存在脆弱性，面对跨模态攻击时缺乏鲁棒性，验证了 PaperGuard 作为评估基准和防御框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PaperGuard 为可信、抗攻击的 AI 辅助学术评审奠定了基准、协议和可实用的防御方法，强调了多模态环境下 AI 评审安全性的重要性和紧迫性。

title: High-Fidelity Two-Step Image Generation via Teacher-Aligned End-to-End Distillation
summary: Few-step diffusion distillation has become increasingly mature for 4-8-step generation, yet pushing further to 2 steps remains challenging. In this work, we introduce Z-Image Turbo++, a high-quality 2-step image generation model distilled from the 8-step Z-Image Turbo teacher. Our method addresses the central bottlenecks of increased task difficulty and limited model capacity in 2-step generation through three simple but effective design choices tailored to this regime. First, we propose Distribution-Aligned Adversarial Learning, which uses teacher-generated images rather than external real images as real samples for GAN training, providing a more attainable and informative adversarial target. Second, we adopt Step-Decoupled Parameterization, assigning independent model parameters to the two denoising steps to better match their distinct capacity demands. Third, we perform End-to-End Training with Iterative Regularization, allowing the first step to receive gradients from final image quality while preserving a meaningful intermediate generation through an explicit step-1 loss. Together, these designs substantially narrow the quality gap between 2-step and 8-step generation in both qualitative and quantitative evaluations, highlighting the potential of carefully tailored distillation strategies for improving the quality-efficiency trade-off in few-step generation.

AI.tldr: Z-Image Turbo++ 通过分布对齐对抗学习、步解耦参数化和端到端迭代正则化训练三项设计，将图像生成扩散蒸馏从8步压缩至2步，显著缩小了2步与8步生成之间的质量差距。
AI.motivation: 现有少步扩散蒸馏在4-8步生成上已较为成熟，但进一步压缩至2步时面临任务难度显著增大和模型容量有限两大瓶颈，导致生成质量与效率之间的权衡仍不理想。
AI.method: 提出三种针对性设计：1) 分布对齐对抗学习，使用教师模型生成图像而非真实图像作为GAN训练的"真实"样本，提供更可达且信息丰富的对抗目标；2) 步解耦参数化，为两个去噪步骤分配独立的模型参数，以匹配各自不同的容量需求；3) 端到端迭代正则化训练，允许第一步从最终图像质量接收梯度，同时通过显式的第一步损失保留有意义的中间生成。
AI.result: 从8步Z-Image Turbo教师模型蒸馏得到的2步Z-Image Turbo++在定性和定量评估中均显著缩小了与8步生成的质量差距，验证了针对2步生成量身定制的蒸馏策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 精心定制的蒸馏策略能够有效改善少步生成中的质量-效率权衡，为将扩散模型推向极少数步数（如2步）的高质量生成提供了可行方向。

title: Evoflux: Inference-Time Evolution of Executable Tool Workflows for Compact Agents
summary: Compact language models (LMs) reduce cost, latency, and deployment risk for tool agents. Yet MCP-style tool use requires more than isolated function calling: an agent must discover tools from live catalogs, satisfy schemas, preserve dependencies across intermediate outputs, and ground final responses in executed evidence. Small planners often generate plausible workflow graphs that fail under tool resolution, parameter validation, dependency tracking, or execution. We argue that this failure mode is poorly handled by small-corpus distillation. A few hundred teacher traces can teach workflow format, but rarely cover the recovery behavior needed to repair failed plans over changing tool catalogs. We introduce Evoflux, an inference-time evolutionary search method that treats compact tool use as the repair of executable tool workflows. It evolves typed workflow graphs through structured edits, execution feedback, adaptive intensity, meta-guided redesign, and diversity pruning. On held-out MCP-Bench tasks spanning live MCP servers and 250 tools, Evoflux raises execution feasibility from roughly 3% to 17-24% across small planners. In contrast, SFT and SFT+DPO on the same search-mined data match, underperform, or collapse below zero-shot performance; ReAct reaches higher peaks, but with higher variance and token cost. These results show that execution-grounded search is more reliable under scarce teacher-trace budgets.

AI.tldr: Evoflux提出了一种推理时演化搜索方法，将轻量级语言模型的工具使用问题转化为可执行工作流图的修复问题，通过结构化编辑、执行反馈和自适应搜索，在MCP-Bench任务上将执行可行性从约3%提升至17-24%，证明了在教师轨迹预算稀缺时基于执行反馈的搜索比蒸馏训练更可靠。
AI.motivation: 紧凑型语言模型在MCP风格的工具调用中面临一个关键问题：它们生成的工作流图在工具解析、参数验证、依赖跟踪和执行环节频繁失败，而小规模教师轨迹蒸馏虽然能教会工作流格式，却难以覆盖修复失败计划所需的恢复行为，导致现有方法在高延迟、高成本场景下表现不佳。
AI.method: Evoflux是一种推理时演化搜索方法，将紧凑型工具使用问题形式化为可执行工具工作流图的修复过程。它通过结构化编辑、执行反馈、自适应搜索强度、元引导重设计和多样性剪枝来演化带类型的工作流图，利用执行结果作为反馈信号驱动搜索过程。
AI.result: 在涵盖250个工具和实时MCP服务器的MCP-Bench任务上，Evoflux将各种小型规划器的执行可行性从约3%提升至17-24%；相比之下，基于相同搜索数据的SFT和SFT+DPO方法表现持平、不如甚至低于零样本基线，ReAct虽然能达到更高峰值但方差更大且token成本更高。
AI.conclusion: 基于执行反馈的搜索在教师轨迹预算稀缺时比小规模蒸馏训练更可靠，Evoflux表明通过推理时搜索而非单纯依赖于蒸馏，可以显著提升紧凑型模型在工具使用场景中的鲁棒性和执行成功率。

title: Agent-based models for the evolution of morphological alternation patterns
summary:
Why is the past of English "go" the apparently unrelated "went"? Such alternations are frequent in languages. They neither aid communication nor learnability, yet they can be persistent, surviving over centuries or millennia.
  We present a multi-agent simulation of the emergence of morphological stem and inflection alternations. Alternate forms arise by phonological changes or, as with "go/went", from lexical alternatives associated with a subset of the population. When an agent 'hears' another agent use a novel form for a slot in the paradigm of a word (say, the past tense of go), they will with some probability adopt that form, possibly spreading its use to other slots in the paradigm that shared the same original form. Thus alternative forms can spread through the population and become entrenched as stem or inflectional marker alternants. Unlike many previous computational studies, our system allows for naturalistic lexical forms, realistic phonological rules, lexicons with hundreds or thousands of entries, and agent populations in the tens or hundreds. It supports several network topologies, diffusion patterns and agent adoption policies.
  One issue with such simulations is evaluation: how realistic is the resulting morphology compared to those of real languages? We introduce the AI Historical Linguist, a novel Large Language Model-driven system that models a debate between two historical linguists. We use this to compare a set of real language morphologies, disguised morphologies, and experimentally evolved morphologies. The results suggest that among the factors that favor more plausible morphologies are scale-free social networks and random Bernoulli adoption of forms.
  We also present three case studies modeling attested historical changes, allowing us to test what might have happened if history had been different.
  All code and data are released.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多智能体仿真框架，模拟语言中词干和屈折交替现象（如go/went）的涌现，并引入基于大语言模型的AI历史语言学家来评估仿真生成形态的合理性，发现无标度社交网络和伯努利采用策略有助于生成更可信的形态交替模式。
AI.motivation: 语言中广泛存在看似无功能性的形态交替现象（如英语go的过去式went），这类现象既不利于沟通也不利于学习，却能在语言中持续数百年甚至数千年，其涌现和持久的机制尚不清晰，现有计算仿真在词汇规模、音系规则真实性和评估方法上存在不足。
AI.method: 构建了多智能体仿真系统，支持自然主义词汇形式、真实音系规则、数百至数千词条的词典以及数十至数百规模的智能体种群，并允许多种网络拓扑、扩散模式和采用策略；同时提出AI历史语言学家——一种基于大语言模型的系统，通过模拟两位历史语言学家的辩论来评估仿真生成形态与真实语言形态的相似性。
AI.result: 实验表明，在影响形态合理性的因素中，无标度社交网络和随机伯努利采用策略倾向于生成更可信的形态交替模式；系统还成功建模了三个真实历史语言变化案例，并测试了历史可能的不同演化路径。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体仿真可以有效再现语言中形态交替现象的涌现过程，大语言模型可以用于评估仿真形态的真实性，网络结构和采用策略是影响形态演变结果的关键因素；所有代码和数据已开源，为历史语言学和计算语言学提供了新的研究工具。

title: Analyzing and Improving Fine-grained Preference Optimization in Medical LVLMs
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved strong performance across medical imaging tasks, yet they remain prone to factual inconsistencies, poor visual grounding, and misalignment with clinically meaningful feedback. Existing post-training alignment approaches, including Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) and its variants, face three critical limitations in the medical domain: (1) sequence-level reward signals treat clinically critical tokens identically to generic filler text; (2) reliance on static supervised fine-tuning references as preferred responses introduces an off-policy distribution shift, steering optimization toward stylistic artifacts over clinical correctness; and (3) alignment objectives lack explicit visual grounding constraints, leaving models insensitive to subtle yet diagnostically decisive pathological features. Our method leverages a bidirectional token-wise KL regularizer alongside a visual-contrastive grounding objective that pairs clean and lesion-corrupted images to penalize responses generated without adequate visual evidence. Together, these components form a fine-grained, on-policy alignment framework that constructs preference pairs by minimally editing model-generated outputs, correcting only clinically erroneous spans while preserving the original linguistic style. Extensive experiments across medical imaging tasks and clinical text generation benchmarks validate the effectiveness of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向医学视觉-语言模型的细粒度、在策略对齐框架，通过双向token级KL正则化和视觉对比基础目标，仅修正临床错误片段同时保留原始语言风格，有效缓解了事实不一致、视觉基础薄弱和与临床反馈对齐不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉-语言模型在医学影像任务中存在事实不一致、视觉基础薄弱和与临床意义反馈对齐不足的问题。现有后训练对齐方法（如DPO及其变体）在医学领域面临三个关键局限：序列级奖励信号无法区分临床关键token与填充文本、依赖静态监督微调参考导致离策略分布偏移使优化偏向风格伪影而非临床正确性、对齐目标缺乏显式视觉基础约束使模型对细微但诊断关键的病理特征不敏感。
AI.method: 该方法提出一个细粒度、在策略对齐框架，核心包含两个组件：双向token级KL正则化（用于在token层面精细化约束对齐过程）和视觉对比基础目标（通过配对干净图像与病变破坏图像，惩罚缺乏充分视觉证据生成的响应）。框架通过在策略方式构造偏好对，对模型生成输出进行最小编辑，仅纠正临床错误片段同时保留原始语言风格。
AI.result: 在医学影像任务和临床文本生成基准上的大量实验验证了该方法的有效性，表明其在提升事实准确性、视觉基础能力和临床对齐性方面优于现有对齐方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了现有序列级对齐方法在医学领域的根本性缺陷，证明了token级细粒度约束和显式视觉基础建模对于医学视觉-语言模型对齐的必要性，为构建临床可信的医疗AI系统提供了重要方法论基础。

title: From AGI to ASI
summary: Over the last decade, building human-level artificial general intelligence has moved from far-fetched speculation to being a concrete next-decade target for many of the largest AI organisations. Achieving this goal would have profound and far-reaching impacts on human society, which raises many complex questions for the decade ahead. This report investigates how AI itself might continue to develop in a post-AGI world along the continuum of machine intelligence. The endpoint of this continuum, Universal AI, is theoretically well understood, which provides some formal grounding for the main focus of this report: the transition from human-level AGI to artificial general superintelligence, which, intuitively, can be understood as a system that is more intelligent and cognitively capable than large organisations of humans. After characterizing ASI, the report discusses four potential pathways from AGI to ASI: scaling AGI, AI paradigm shifts, recursive improvement, and ASI emerging from large-scale multi-agent collectives. The report then discusses possible frictions and bottlenecks along these pathways. Determining whether the impact of these frictions will be negligible or substantial raises a number of concrete open research questions. Due to large uncertainties for predicting ASI progress, it cannot be ruled out that AI progress might continue to accelerate over the next years. This could imply that the image of a single transformative step change, caused by the introduction of human-level AGI into our society, could be inaccurate. More apt might be the prospect of a series of transformative societal changes caused by AI-enabled progress and breakthroughs across many areas of science and technology. Preparing for this prospect requires a massively interdisciplinary endeavour of global scope and interest.

AI.tldr: 本报告探讨了从人类级通用人工智能（AGI）向通用超级智能（ASI）转变的路径、摩擦与瓶颈，指出该转变可能并非单一变革性步骤，而是一系列由AI驱动的科学技术突破所引发的连锁社会变革。
AI.motivation: 尽管构建人类级AGI已成为许多顶级AI组织的近十年目标，但AGI之后AI如何沿着智能连续体继续发展、特别是从AGI过渡到超越大型组织认知能力的通用超级智能（ASI）的路径与挑战尚缺乏系统研究，本报告旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 报告在理论上以通用AI（Universal AI）的形式化框架为起点，明确了从AGI到ASI的智能连续体概念；随后提出了四条从AGI通往ASI的潜在路径：AGI规模扩展、AI范式转变、递归自我改进以及大规模多智能体集体涌现出ASI，并分析了各路径中可能存在的摩擦与瓶颈。
AI.result: 报告指出，由于预测ASI进展存在巨大不确定性，不能排除AI进展在未来数年继续加速的可能性；这意味着人类级AGI的引入可能并非单一变革性事件，而是一系列由AI驱动、横跨多个科学与技术领域的突破所引发的持续社会变革。
AI.conclusion: 应对这种持续变革的前景需要全球范围内的大规模跨学科合作；该研究提出了多项具体的开放研究问题，用以评估从AGI到ASI路径中摩擦因素的显著性，为未来的安全与治理研究提供了方向。

title: Small LLMs for Biomedical Claim Verification: Cost-Effective Fine-Tuning, Structural Dataset Shortcuts, and Cross-Domain Generalization
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures, 12 tables. To appear at BioNLP Workshop, ACL 2026
summary: Large Language Models such as GPT-4o and GPT-5 achieve strong zero-shot performance on biomedical claim verification, but cost and opacity limit scalable use. We fine-tune three small LLMs: Phi-3-mini (3.8B), Qwen2.5-3B, and Mistral-7B, via QLoRA on SciFact and HealthVer, providing the first study of QLoRA models against GPT-4o and fine-tuned BioLinkBERT encoders. Mistral-7B QLoRA surpasses both GPT-4o and GPT-5 (up to 12% F1 gain) at a fractional cost using just 1,008 training examples. We conduct extensive in-domain and cross-domain evaluation: models trained on SciFact tested on HealthVer and vice versa, at matched sizes to isolate dataset structure from data quantity. We identify a previously unreported structural artifact in SciFact that inflates in-domain scores, and show through bidirectional out-of-domain evaluation that training on structurally sound data enables robust cross-domain transfer. We plan to release all code and adapter checkpoints.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次将QLoRA微调的小型LLM（Mistral-7B、Phi-3-mini、Qwen2.5-3B）应用于生物医学声明验证，发现Mistral-7B QLoRA在仅使用1,008个训练样本的情况下，以极低计算成本超越GPT-4o和GPT-5最多12%的F1分数，并揭示了SciFact数据集中的结构性伪影问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型（如GPT-4o、GPT-5）在生物医学声明验证中虽具备强零样本能力，但其高昂成本和模型不透明性限制了可扩展的实际应用，亟需探索低成本、高效且可解释的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用QLoRA方法对三个小型LLM——Phi-3-mini（3.8B）、Qwen2.5-3B和Mistral-7B——进行参数高效微调，训练数据来自SciFact和HealthVer数据集（共1,008个样本），并与GPT-4o、GPT-5及微调的BioLinkBERT编码器进行全面对比。
AI.result: Mistral-7B QLoRA在生物医学声明验证任务上以极低的推理成本超越GPT-4o和GPT-5，最高F1分数提升达12%。通过同域和跨域双向评估发现，SciFact数据集中存在此前未被报告的结构性伪影，该伪影会虚高同域评估得分，而基于结构无偏数据训练的模型具备更强的跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 小型LLM通过QLoRA微调可以在生物医学声明验证中超越大规模闭源模型，实现成本与性能的显著平衡；研究中发现的数据集结构性伪影问题对现有评测基准的可信度提出警示，未来应关注数据质量和跨域泛化能力。

title: ECA: Efficient Continual Alignment for Open-Ended Image-to-Text Generation
comment: Accepted at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Incremental Learning (IL) for Open-ended Image-to-Text Generation (OpenITG) enables models to continuously generate accurate, contextually relevant text for new images while preserving previously acquired knowledge. Unlike prior studies, this paper addresses a more practical scenario in which the predominant category of visual data shifts over time as environments evolve. In this context, we introduce a new notion of continual alignment, which incrementally adapts the alignment module within pre-trained VLMs to preserve high-quality cross-modal representations. Based on this idea, we propose Efficient Continual Alignment (ECA), a novel exemplar-free IL approach for OpenITG. The key challenge is enabling the model to acquire new, task-specific features while minimizing interference with the established alignment without accessing raw data from previous tasks. To address this, ECA employs three core mechanisms: a Mixture of Query (MoQ) module that adapts task-specific query tokens, a Fisher Dynamic Expansion (FeDEx) that dynamically expands model structure based on a Fisher Information Matrix (FIM)-based metric, and an embedding dictionary with Dictionary Replay (DR) to retain past knowledge. To evaluate ECA's performance, we construct four new IL OpenITG benchmarks that better reflect real-world scenarios. Experimental results demonstrate that ECA significantly mitigates catastrophic forgetting and improves IL performance compared to baseline methods. Code and benchmarks are available at https://github.com/Snowball0823/ECA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出高效持续对齐（ECA），一种无样本的增量学习方法，用于解决开放域图像到文本生成中视觉数据类别漂移时的灾难性遗忘问题，通过混合查询令牌、Fisher动态扩展和字典重播三种机制实现持续对齐，实验表明ECA显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有增量学习研究主要关注分类任务或静态数据分布，缺乏对开放域图像到文本生成（OpenITG）中视觉数据主导类别随时间漂移这一实际场景的探索；核心挑战在于模型需持续获取新任务特定特征，同时在不访问旧数据的情况下最小化对已建立跨模态对齐的干扰。
AI.method: ECA提出三种核心机制：混合查询（MoQ）模块用于自适应任务特定查询令牌；基于Fisher信息矩阵的Fisher动态扩展（FeDEx）机制实现模型结构动态扩展；以及嵌入字典与字典重播（DR）策略保留历史知识。整体上，该方法在预训练视觉语言模型中对齐模块进行增量式持续对齐，且无需依赖旧任务原始数据。
AI.result: 论文构建了四个更贴近真实场景的增量学习OpenITG基准，实验结果显示ECA在缓解灾难性遗忘方面效果显著，整体增量学习性能全面优于对比基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究验证了通过持续对齐机制在无样本条件下有效实现开放域图像到文本增量学习的可行性，为视觉语言模型在动态环境下的持续学习提供了新思路，代码和基准已开源。

title: Reducing the Complexity of Deep Learning Models for EEG Analysis on Wearable Devices
summary: Wearable healthcare devices are the fastest-growing Internet of Things (IoT) sector. Many automated healthcare services rely on two crucial biological signals, namely ECG and EEG, which reflect the activity of the heart and brain, respectively. Although deep neural networks are considered the primary way to process and analyze these signals, the very tight energy and computational power constraints in wearable devices are far below the computational, energy, and memory bandwidth demands of DNN models, thereby impeding the deployment of deep learning in many practical wearable services. This paper investigates the feasibility of deploying state-of-the-art DNN models in resource-constrained wearable devices. Notably, we explore the trade-off between accuracy and computational complexity of DNNs when parameter quantization and electrode reduction methods are used. Our investigation centers on several state-of-the-art DNN models designed for EEG signal analysis, specifically for detecting epileptic seizures. Our findings demonstrate that, when applied judiciously, these techniques can significantly reduce the complexity of the DNNs under consideration with minimal adverse effects on accuracy. These results reveal the explicit trade-offs between accuracy and complexity reduction encountered when adapting DNN-based online EEG analysis for wearable devices.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在资源受限的可穿戴设备上部署深度神经网络用于脑电信号（EEG）分析的可行性，重点探索了参数量化和电极缩减方法在降低计算复杂性与维持模型精度之间的权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 可穿戴医疗设备是物联网中增长最快的领域，其中ECG和EEG信号处理对自动化医疗服务至关重要。然而，深度神经网络的高计算、能耗和内存需求与可穿戴设备的极严格资源约束之间存在严重矛盾，阻碍了深度学习在实用可穿戴服务中的部署。
AI.method: 本文研究了多种最先进的DNN模型（专用于癫痫发作检测的EEG信号分析模型），采用参数量化和电极缩减两种方法来降低模型复杂度，并系统评估了这些方法在精度与计算复杂度之间的权衡关系。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，在合理应用的情况下，参数量化和电极缩减技术能够显著降低DNN模型的计算复杂度，同时对模型精度的影响极小。研究揭示了在适配基于DNN的在线EEG分析至可穿戴设备时，精度与复杂度缩减之间存在明确的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 通过参数量化和电极缩减技术，可以在不影响可穿戴设备实际可用精度的前提下大幅降低DNN模型复杂度，为深度学习方法在资源受限的可穿戴医疗设备上的部署提供了可行路径和明确的权衡指导。

title: PRISM: Prosody-Integrated Multi-Agent Reasoning Framework for Empathetic Spoken Dialogue
summary: Empathetic spoken dialogue systems require not only semantically appropriate responses but also emotionally aligned prosodic expression. However, cascade pipelines often discard acoustic cues during speech-to-text conversion, while end-to-end speech models lack interpretable control over emotion and knowledge integration. To address these challenges, we propose PRISM, a multi-agent framework for empathetic spoken dialogue that decouples speech perception, response generation, and speech synthesis into coordinated components. PRISM introduces a prosody-to-language translation mechanism to stabilize large language model reasoning and enables on-demand invocation of external knowledge tools for empathetic dialogue generation. Experimental results demonstrate that PRISM achieves consistent improvements in empathy, prosodic appropriateness, and text response generation quality across objective and subjective metrics. Our code is available at: https://github.com/Bxzfrm/PRISM.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一个多智能体框架，通过解耦语音感知、响应生成和语音合成，并引入韵律到语言翻译机制，解决了共情口语对话系统中级联流水线丢失声学线索和端到端模型缺乏可解释控制的问题，在共情性、韵律适当性和文本响应质量上取得了一致提升。
AI.motivation: 现有共情口语对话系统面临双重挑战：级联流水线在语音转文本过程中会丢弃声学线索（如韵律信息），导致共情表达缺失；而端到端语音模型虽然保留了声学信息，但缺乏对情感和知识融合的可解释性控制，难以在推理过程中灵活调用外部知识。
AI.method: PRISM提出多智能体框架将共情口语对话解耦为三个协调组件：语音感知、响应生成和语音合成。核心创新包括一个韵律到语言翻译机制，用于将声学韵律信息转化为大语言模型可理解的表示以稳定推理；同时支持按需调用外部知识工具，增强共情对话生成中的知识感知能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，PRISM在客观和主观评价指标上均取得一致改进，具体体现在共情性（empathy）、韵律适当性（prosodic appropriateness）和文本响应生成质量三个维度上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PRISM通过解耦式多智能体框架有效桥接了级联流水线与端到端模型之间的鸿沟，证明了显式韵律信息注入和大语言模型推理结合能够显著提升口语对话系统的共情表达能力，为共情口语对话系统的设计提供了新的范式。

title: SalArt-VQA: Diagnosing Whether VLMs Understand Salient Artifacts in Generated Images
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used to detect whether AI-generated images contain visible artifacts, yet their ability to analyze such artifacts remains poorly understood. A correct image-level decision can still hide important failures: a model may correctly flag an artifact while relying on the wrong visual cue, selecting the wrong region, or describing a defect that the image does not support. To evaluate these behaviors directly, we introduce SalArt-VQA, a diagnostic benchmark for fine-grained SALient ARTifact understanding in AI-generated images. SalArt-VQA contains 950 images and 3,681 human-authored multiple-choice questions spanning artifact images, matched real reference images, and paired generated reference images. Four aligned question types evaluate presence detection, semantic localization, spatial grounding, and evidence-grounded defect identification, while the reference splits test calibration and abstention when the annotated defect is absent. Across 20 VLMs, SalArt-VQA reveals failures that image-level detection accuracy hides: the strongest model reaches 99.37% detection recall on artifact images but answers all four artifact-side questions correctly on only 53.26% of images. Comparing artifact images with artifact-free references reveals a sensitivity-calibration tradeoff: sensitive models often make unsupported artifact claims, while conservative models avoid false alarms largely by missing real artifacts. These results show that high artifact detection accuracy alone does not imply grounded artifact understanding. SalArt-VQA exposes these hidden failure modes and provides a fine-grained evaluation of whether VLM artifact claims are supported by local visual evidence.

AI.tldr: 提出SalArt-VQA基准，用于细粒度评估视觉语言模型对AI生成图像中显著人工痕迹的理解能力，揭示图像级检测准确率无法反映的深层失败模式，如错误依赖视觉线索、错误定位或提出图像不支持的错误缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注视觉语言模型（VLM）能否正确检测AI生成图像中的人工痕迹，但忽略了模型可能仅凭偶然正确的线索做出正确判断，实际存在依赖错误视觉线索、选择错误区域或描述图像不支持的缺陷等问题，这些隐藏的失败模式无法通过图像级检测准确率反映。
AI.method: 构建SalArt-VQA诊断基准，包含950张图像和3,681道人工编写的多选题，涵盖人工痕迹图像、匹配的真实参考图像和配对生成参考图像；设计四种对齐问题类型（存在检测、语义定位、空间 grounding 和证据支持缺陷识别），并通过参考样本分裂测试模型在缺陷缺失时的校准和弃权能力。
AI.result: 在20个VLM上评估发现，最强模型在人工痕迹图像上的检测召回率达99.37%，但仅在53.26%的图像上正确回答所有四类问题；人工痕迹图像与无痕迹参考图像的对比揭示模型的敏感性-校准权衡：敏感模型易提出无证据支持的人工痕迹主张，而保守模型主要通过遗漏真实痕迹避免误报。
AI.conclusion: 高检测准确率并不意味着模型对人工痕迹有 grounded 的理解；SalArt-VQA暴露了传统评估无法发现的隐藏失败模式，提供了基于局部视觉证据的细粒度评估方法，表明需要超越图像级指标来评估VLM的工件理解能力。

title: A Tutorial on World Models and Physical AI
summary: World modeling is emerging as a central principle for building intelligent systems capable of prediction, reasoning, and decision making. A central distinction can be drawn between explicit world models, which learn structured dynamics for rollout-based reasoning and planning, and implicit world models, which encode predictive structure within scalable learned representations. These complementary paradigms provide a foundation for physical AI in domains such as robotics and autonomous driving, enabling intelligence beyond reactive control under real-world constraints. Recent foundation models further suggest a pathway toward unified systems integrating perception, prediction, and action. Despite rapid progress, major challenges remain in hierarchical reasoning, long-horizon planning, and autonomous goal formation, which are critical for advancing toward artificial general intelligence. This tutorial presents a coherent framework in which diverse world modeling approaches are unified through shared predictive structure and differentiated by how such structure is represented and exploited.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一框架，将显式世界模型（通过结构化动力学进行推理和规划）与隐式世界模型（在可扩展表示中编码预测结构）整合起来，并基于预测结构这一共享原则对多样化方法进行分类和差异化分析。
AI.motivation: 世界建模正成为构建具备预测、推理和决策能力的智能系统的核心原则，但现有方法在显式与隐式世界模型之间存在显著范式差异，缺乏统一的视角来理解其内在联系与互补关系；同时，在层次推理、长时域规划和自主目标形成等关键问题上仍面临重大挑战，亟需一个连贯的理论框架来整合多样化的世界建模方法。
AI.method: 本文以综述教程的形式，提出了一个统一框架，将显式世界模型（学习结构化动力学以支持基于推演的推理和规划）与隐式世界模型（在可扩展的表示学习中编码预测结构）作为互补范式进行系统分类；该框架基于“共享预测结构”这一核心原则统一各类方法，并通过该结构如何被表示和利用来区分不同方法，同时探讨了近期基础模型在统一感知、预测和行动方面的潜在路径。
AI.result: 本文系统梳理了显式与隐式世界模型两大范式在机器人、自动驾驶等物理AI领域的应用基础，指出其在超越反应式控制方面展现出显著能力；同时明确了在层次推理、长时域规划和自主目标形成等维度仍存在的关键难题，并认为基础模型为构建统一系统提供了可行方向。
AI.conclusion: 世界建模方法虽形式多样，但可通过共享预测结构这一原则统一理解，不同方法的本质差异在于该结构如何被表示和利用；迈向通用人工智能的关键突破将依赖于解决层次推理、长时域规划和自主目标形成等核心挑战，而基础模型是向统一系统演进的重要路径。

title: SENTINEL: Failure-Driven Reinforcement Learning for Training Tool-Using Language Model Agents
summary: Language model agents are increasingly effective in solving realistic tasks through multi-turn tool use. However, training reliable tool-using agents remains challenging in practice. While reinforcement learning provides an on-policy paradigm for improving agents from their own environment interactions, its effectiveness depends heavily on the training task distribution. When tasks are fixed before training, the task distribution can become increasingly mismatched with the policy's evolving capabilities, causing many rollouts to be spent on uninformative tasks. We propose SENTINEL, a failure-driven reinforcement learning framework that turns the Solver's rollout failures into targeted training tasks. SENTINEL follows a Controller--Proposer--Solver loop: the Controller analyzes failed trajectories and summarizes recurring error patterns, the Proposer generates executable tasks that stress these weaknesses, and the Solver is trained on the targeted tasks. On Tau2-Bench Retail with Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507, SENTINEL improves Pass\^{}1 from 66.4 to 74.9 and outperforms RL on general synthetic tasks across Pass\^{}k metrics. These results demonstrate that model failures provide an effective and scalable source of targeted training signal for improving tool-using language model agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SENTINEL，一种失败驱动的强化学习框架，通过将智能体的回合失败转化为针对性训练任务，有效缓解了工具使用语言模型智能体在训练中因任务分布与策略能力不匹配导致的低效问题，在Tau2-Bench Retail上将Pass@1从66.4提升至74.9。
AI.motivation: 训练可靠的工具使用语言模型智能体仍具挑战性。强化学习的有效性高度依赖训练任务分布，当任务在训练前固定时，任务分布会与策略不断演进的能力产生失配，导致大量交互回合浪费在低信息量的任务上，影响训练效率。
AI.method: SENTINEL采用Controller–Proposer–Solver循环架构：Controller分析失败轨迹并总结重复出现的错误模式，Proposer基于这些模式生成可执行的压力测试任务，Solver在针对性生成的任务上进行强化学习训练，从而将回合失败转化为有目标的训练信号。
AI.result: 在Tau2-Bench Retail基准上，基于Qwen3-4B-Thinking-2507模型，SENTINEL将Pass@1从66.4提升至74.9，且在多个Pass@k指标上全面优于在通用合成任务上训练的强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 模型自身的失败可以为改进工具使用语言模型智能体提供有效且可扩展的针对性训练信号，SENTINEL框架成功验证了利用失败驱动范式来提升智能体在复杂工具调用任务中的表现。

title: Perceive, Interact, Reason: Building Tool-Augmented Visual Agents for Spatial Reasoning
summary: While recent vision-language models (VLMs) demonstrate strong multimodal understanding, they remain limited in spatial reasoning tasks that require active evidence acquisition and multi-step visual interaction. This limitation suggests that relying solely on implicit visual representations from vision encoders is insufficient for recovering fine-grained spatial evidence. We introduce PERception-Interaction-reason Agent (PERIA), a tool-augmented visual agent for spatial reasoning tasks across map reasoning, visual probing, and vision reconstruction. PERIA uses two lightweight tool families: vision perception tools for exposing textual, symbolic, and spatial evidence, and vision interaction tools for manipulating visual context, tracing paths, and verifying spatial relations. To train PERIA, we develop a unified recipe that combines supervised tool-use trajectory synthesis, composite rewards, and Observation-Relaxed Group-in-Group Policy Optimization (OR-GIGPO) for effective multi-tool behavior. Experiments on 13 benchmarks from 8 datasets show that PERIA-8B improves over the Qwen3-8B backbone by 10.0% on in-distribution benchmarks and 4.4% on out-of-distribution benchmarks, while outperforming previous state-of-the-art baselines of similar size by 7.0%-14.8%. It also achieves performance comparable to much larger models such as Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Thinking and GPT-5, demonstrating the effectiveness of PERIA in enhancing spatial reasoning capabilities.

AI.tldr: 提出PERIA，一个通过工具增强和多智能体策略优化来提升视觉语言模型空间推理能力的视觉代理框架，在多个空间推理任务上显著超越同规模模型并达到与超大模型相当的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型尽管具有强大的多模态理解能力，但在需要主动证据获取和多步视觉交互的空间推理任务中表现有限，仅依赖视觉编码器的隐式表示不足以恢复细粒度的空间证据。
AI.method: 提出PERIA框架，包含两类轻量工具族：视觉感知工具用于暴露文本、符号和空间证据，视觉交互工具用于操作视觉上下文、追踪路径和验证空间关系；采用监督式工具使用轨迹合成、复合奖励以及观察松弛组内组策略优化（OR-GIGPO）进行联合训练。
AI.result: 在8个数据集的13个基准上，PERIA-8B相较于Qwen3-8B骨干网络在分布内基准上提升10.0%，在分布外基准上提升4.4%，超越此前同规模最优基线7.0%-14.8%，性能可与Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Thinking和GPT-5等超大模型相媲美。
AI.conclusion: PERIA证明了通过工具增强和有效的策略优化可以显著提升小型VLM的空间推理能力，使其达到甚至接近超大模型的水平，为构建高效的视觉代理系统提供了可行路径。

title: The Containment Gap: How Deployed Agentic AI Frameworks Fail Public-Facing Safety Requirements
summary: Agentic large language model systems that autonomously invoke tools, maintain persistent memory, and execute multi-step plans are increasingly deployed in public-facing domains, including government services, healthcare triage, and financial advising. We ask whether the frameworks used to build these systems provide architectural-level structural safety guarantees. Applying six containment principles derived from a compositional model of agentic architectures, we audit three dominant frameworks (LangChain, AutoGPT, and OpenAI Agents SDK) and find no native compliance in any of them. Memory integrity, a defense against one of the most prevalent vulnerability classes, is not observed in any of the three evaluated frameworks. We validate these findings empirically: in a simulated government benefits agent built on LangChain, a single memory-poisoning write induces persistent targeted corruption across all tested seeds and backends, increasing the wrongful denial rate for targeted applicants to 88.9%. Under a complex five-factor policy, the same attack preserves aggregate accuracy while increasing targeted wrongful denials by 3.5x, rendering the corruption difficult to detect through standard monitoring. We then introduce two lightweight containment mechanisms: a memory integrity validator and a policy gate, which eliminate both attack vectors with sub-millisecond overhead (<0.2ms per call). We conclude that the current agentic framework ecosystem may not yet meet secure-by-default expectations for public-facing deployments and outline priority architectural interventions to enable trustworthy deployment in high-stakes, socially impactful applications.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性审计了三个主流智能体框架（LangChain、AutoGPT、OpenAI Agents SDK），发现所有框架均未原生满足安全防护原则，特别是缺乏内存完整性保护；通过模拟政府福利智能体的实证攻击，单次内存投毒将目标申请人的错误拒绝率提升至88.9%，并提出了两种轻量级防护机制，以低于0.2ms的开销完全消除攻击向量。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型智能体系统已部署于政府服务、医疗分诊、金融咨询等面向公众的高风险领域，但当前用于构建这些系统的框架是否在架构层面提供结构性的安全保障尚不明确，因此需要系统性地评估其安全缺陷。
AI.method: 基于组合式智能体架构模型推导出六项隔离防护原则，据此审计LangChain、AutoGPT和OpenAI Agents SDK三个主流框架；随后在LangChain上构建模拟政府福利智能体，实施内存投毒攻击以实证评估；最后提出内存完整性验证器和策略门控两种轻量级防护机制。
AI.result: 三个框架均未原生遵守任何一项防护原则，尤其均缺乏内存完整性保护；单次内存投毒攻击可在所有测试种子和后端下对目标申请人产生持续性的定向错误，将错误拒绝率提升至88.9%；在复杂五因素政策下，攻击使目标定向错误拒绝率提升3.5倍，同时保持整体准确率不变，难以通过标准监控检测；所提出的两种防护机制以低于0.2ms的调用开销完全消除两种攻击向量。
AI.conclusion: 当前智能体框架生态系统尚未达到面向公开展部署时应具备的默认安全标准，亟需优先进行架构层面的安全干预，以实现高风险社会影响应用中的可信部署。

title: No Hidden Prompts Needed! You Can Game AI Peer Review with Presentation-Only Revisions
summary:
As AI-generated reviews move from experimental tools into peer-review infrastructure, most robustness concerns have focused on explicit attacks such as hidden instructions and prompt injection. We study a harder and more policy-relevant failure mode: no hidden text, no prompt injection, and no changes to methods, experiments, figures, equations, proofs, or numerical results. The attacker modifies only presentation-level content, such as the abstract, contribution framing, related work, discussion, and narrative structure. We introduce adversarial repackaging: a closed-loop attack that uses AI-reviewer feedback to search for presentation-level revisions while keeping the scientific evidence fixed. Across three mainstream AI reviewers, adversarial repackaging achieves a 75.1% attack success rate and a mean score gain of +1.21/10. The effect is not explained by ordinary prose polishing. We also reveal that strategies that change how the reviewer interprets the paper, such as related-work repositioning and analytical discussion expansion, substantially outperform surface edits such as local polishing, table formatting, and algorithm boxes.
  Our analysis reveals two deeper structural failure modes. First, AI reviewers are easier to impress than to convince: highlighting strengths reliably increases perceived merit, while attempts to dissolve weaknesses frequently backfire. Second, AI reviewers can confuse the appearance of addressing a limitation with actually resolving it, allowing unchanged evidence to be reinterpreted as stronger scientific contribution. These results show that the deployment risk is not only malicious hidden instructions, but the emergence of paper presentation itself as an optimization surface. We release a contamination-free rolling benchmark and attack framework for testing whether AI reviewers remain anchored to scientific content under presentation-only edits.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了AI审稿系统在仅修改论文呈现层面内容（如摘要、贡献表述、讨论框架）而保持所有科学证据不变的情况下，仍可被一种名为"对抗性重包装"的闭环攻击策略显著操纵，攻击成功率达75.1%，表明论文呈现本身已成为可优化的对抗面，部署风险不仅来自显式恶意指令。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对AI审稿系统的鲁棒性关注主要集中在显式攻击（如隐藏指令和提示注入），但更隐蔽且更具政策相关性的失效模式——即不修改任何科学证据、仅调整呈现层面内容即可误导审稿系统——尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 提出对抗性重包装（adversarial repackaging）：一种闭环攻击框架，利用AI审稿系统的反馈信号搜索仅改变呈现层面（如摘要、贡献表述、相关工作定位、叙事结构）的修订方案，同时保持方法、实验、图表、方程、证明和数值结果等科学证据完全不变。
AI.result: 在三个主流AI审稿系统上，对抗性重包装实现了75.1%的攻击成功率和平均+1.21/10的分数提升；效果远超普通散文润色。分析揭示两种结构性失效模式：AI审稿者更易被"打动"而非"说服"（强调优势可靠地提升感知价值，而试图消除弱点常适得其反），以及AI审稿者会将"看起来解决了局限性"与"实际解决了局限性"混淆。
AI.conclusion: AI审稿系统的部署风险不仅来自恶意隐藏指令，还来自论文呈现本身作为优化表面的涌现性漏洞；研究发布了无污染滚动基准测试和攻击框架，用于检验AI审稿者在仅呈现编辑下是否仍锚定于科学内容。

title: Language-Guided Abstraction for Visual Reasoning
summary: The Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC) is viewed as a critical avenue to Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), as it enables models to learn abstract transformation rules from few-shot examples and then generalize to new tasks. However, prevalent ARC methodology is either pure language or vision-only (i.e., VARC). The former depends heavily on LLMs, consuming billions of parameters. The latter often struggles to capture high-level semantics, leading to overfitting on pixel-level patterns. To bridge this gap, we propose L-VARC, a novel framework that enhances visual reasoning via a language-guided Learning Using Privileged Information (LUPI) branch. Specifically, we design a Semantic Compression Module by feeding a unified, task-agnostic prompt into DeepSeek-V3. In this way, the raw LARC (a crowd-sourced language description dataset) can be substantially refined and structured, fitting with the context length constraint of standard text encoders (e.g., CLIP). Moreover, we design a Cross-Attention Projector to align visual features with semantic embeddings, aiming to guide the training of the ARC model. Notably, the LUPI branch is taken in the training process and will be discarded during inference, thereby yielding a lightweight model with a mere 18 million parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our L-VARC effectively leverages linguistic priors to boost visual reasoning and outperforms state-of-the-art. Ablation studies further confirm the contribution of the two new designs towards the L-VARC framework. The code is available at https://github.com/GZHU-DVL/L-VARC.

AI.tldr: 提出L-VARC框架，通过语言引导的学习利用特权信息（LUPI）分支增强视觉推理，仅用18M参数即在ARC任务上取得超越现有方法的效果，推理时不引入额外语言分支以保持轻量。
AI.motivation: 现有ARC研究方法存在两极化问题：纯语言方法依赖LLM需数十亿参数，视觉方法则难以捕捉高层语义、容易过拟合像素级模式，两者均难以有效平衡语义理解与计算效率。
AI.method: 设计语义压缩模块，将统一任务无关提示输入DeepSeek-V3对原始LARC语言描述精炼结构化，使其适配文本编码器（如CLIP）的上下文长度约束；设计交叉注意力投影器对齐视觉特征与语义嵌入，以LUPI分支在训练阶段引导视觉模型，推理时丢弃该分支，最终模型仅18M参数。
AI.result: L-VARC在ARC基准上超越现有最先进方法，消融实验验证了语义压缩模块和交叉注意力投影器的各自贡献，模型仅18M参数即实现高效视觉推理。
AI.conclusion: 语言引导的LUPI机制可在不增加推理负担的前提下有效提升视觉推理能力，为ARC任务提供了一条兼顾性能与轻量化的可行路径。

title: Teach-and-Repeat: Accurately Extracting Operational Knowledge from Mobile Screen Demonstrations to Empower GUI Agents
comment: 20 pages, 9 figures. Yudong Zhang and Lei Hu contributed equally to this work. Xingyu Liu, Zuojian Wang, and Zhilin Gao are corresponding authors
summary: Understanding the digital world on mobile devices is shifting from static UI perception to dynamic action comprehension. This capability enables models to convert visual state transitions into operational knowledge, defined as short natural-language sentences that describe action types, target UI elements, textual arguments, and execution orders. However, due to the highly diverse and heterogeneous UI designs across applications, existing vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to accurately infer these underlying operations. To bridge this gap, we introduce Teach VLM, a core model designed to translate mobile screen trajectories into step-wise operational knowledge by extracting and analyzing operation-related keyframes from demonstration videos. To address the scarcity of aligned training data, we develop a systematic data flywheel for scalable data acquisition. We further introduce a novel Chinese Mobile Screen Teach Benchmark for fine-grained evaluation. Building upon Teach VLM, we propose the Teach-and-Repeat paradigm, where the generated operational knowledge serves as an interpretable procedural reference to guide downstream screen-based execution agents. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that Teach VLM significantly outperforms strong VLM baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance in operation semantics prediction. Furthermore, experiments in Android World show that our paradigm yields consistent Task Success Rate improvements for downstream agents. Together, Teach VLM and the Teach-and-Repeat paradigm offer a practical pathway from raw demonstrations to reusable task automation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Teach VLM 模型与 Teach-and-Repeat 范式，将移动设备屏幕轨迹自动转化为可解释的操作知识（步骤式自然语言描述），并利用该知识指导下游执行代理，显著提升了操作语义预测与任务自动化的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在将移动屏幕动态视觉状态转化为操作知识（如动作类型、目标UI元素、文本参数及执行顺序）时，因UI设计的高度异构性与多样性而难以准确推理；同时，缺乏大规模对齐训练数据，制约了模型对操作语义的理解能力。
AI.method: Teach VLM 通过从移动屏幕演示视频中提取和分析操作相关关键帧，将轨迹翻译为步骤式操作知识；为缓解训练数据稀缺问题，构建了系统化的数据飞轮用于规模化数据采集；并提出中文移动屏幕教学基准（Chinese Mobile Screen Teach Benchmark）用于细粒度评估；进一步，基于该模型提出 Teach-and-Repeat 范式，将生成的操作知识作为可解释的过程性参考，指导下游执行代理完成自动化任务。
AI.result: 在操作语义预测任务上，Teach VLM 显著优于强视觉-语言基线模型，达到最先进水平；在 Android World 实验环境中，Teach-and-Repeat 范式在下游代理的任务成功率上取得了一致性提升。
AI.conclusion: Teach VLM 与 Teach-and-Repeat 范式共同提供了一条从原始演示到可复用任务自动化的实用路径，验证了可解释操作知识对提升移动端屏幕执行代理性能的有效性，并为UI理解与操作推理研究提供了新范式。

title: G-Long: Graph-Enhanced Memory Management for Efficient Long-Term Dialogue Agents
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have advanced open-domain dialogue systems, maintaining long-term consistency remains a challenge due to inherent limitations in long-context reasoning and the inefficiency of processing extensive raw text. Existing approaches typically rely on either unstructured memory storage, which is prone to information loss, or computationally expensive LLMs that incur high latency. To address these limitations, we propose G-Long, a graph-enhanced framework that utilizes a fine-tuned small Language Model (sLM) for structured triplet extraction and associative retrieval, significantly reducing operational costs. Furthermore, we introduce the novel attention-aware importance scoring mechanism that leverages the intrinsic cross-attention signals of a T5 summarizer to identify salient memories. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that G-Long achieves state-of-the-art performance in both response generation and memory retrieval, yielding performance gains of up to 9.8% in response quality on MSC and 40.8% in retrieval recall on LME, while significantly minimizing computational overhead.

AI.tldr: G-Long 提出一种基于图增强的小语言模型框架，通过微调小模型进行结构化三元组提取与关联检索，并结合注意力感知重要性评分机制，在显著降低计算成本的同时，在响应生成和记忆检索任务上达到了最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型（LLM）的开放域对话系统在维护长期一致性方面存在两大难题：一是长上下文推理存在固有局限，二是处理大量原始文本效率低下且计算成本高昂。已有方法中，非结构化记忆存储容易导致信息丢失，而依赖LLM的方案则面临高延迟和计算开销大的问题。
AI.method: G-Long 提出一种图增强框架，核心包含两个组件：一是利用微调后的小语言模型（sLM）进行结构化三元组提取与关联检索，大幅降低运行成本；二是提出注意力感知重要性评分机制，通过利用T5摘要模型内在的交叉注意力信号来识别关键记忆。该框架通过图结构组织记忆，并实现高效的检索与生成。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准上的广泛实验表明，G-Long 在响应生成和记忆检索任务上均达到最先进水平：在MSC数据集上响应质量提升达9.8%，在LME数据集上检索召回率提升达40.8%，同时显著降低了计算开销。
AI.conclusion: G-Long 通过结合小语言模型与图结构记忆以及注意力感知评分机制，有效解决了开放域对话系统中长期一致性与计算效率之间的权衡问题，为构建低成本、高性能的长期对话记忆系统提供了可行的新路径。

title: Magnifying What Matters: Attention-Guided Adaptive Rendering for Visual Text Comprehension
summary: Visual Text Comprehension (VTC) renders text into images for a vision-language model (VLM) to read, sidestepping LLM context-window limits and powering applications from long-page OCR to multi-page memory QA. Yet existing VTC pipelines treat rendering and layout as a fixed, content-agnostic preprocessing step and offer little mechanistic understanding of how VLMs internally process visualized text. Through a focused empirical study on VTC QA tasks, we reveal that VLMs exhibit a localization-without-utilization regime: evidence-localizing attention emerges sharply in the middle-to-late layers and is largely decoupled from answer correctness, yet simply enlarging the localized spans on the rendered page recovers a large fraction of the failures. Building on these observations, we propose AGAR (Attention-Guided Adaptive Rendering), a training-free, model-agnostic method that leverages a VLM's own middle-to-late layer attention to identify the top-K important visual patches, maps them back to word spans, and re-renders the page with those spans enlarged before re-inferring the answer. Extensive experiments across nine VTC benchmarks (short-form, long-context, and multi-page memory QA) and four VLM backbones show that AGAR (i)consistently improves off-the-shelf VLMs as a plug-and-play enhancement, (ii)composes with VLM post-training to yield further gains, and (iii)remains robust under both visual- and text-side input degradation.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了视觉语言模型在视觉文本理解任务中存在"定位而不利用"的注意力特性，并提出AGAR——一种无需训练、模型无关的自适应渲染方法，通过利用模型自身中后层注意力机制定位关键视觉区域并重渲染来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉文本理解流水线将文本渲染和布局视为固定的、与内容无关的预处理步骤，并且缺乏对VLM在内部如何处理可视化文本的机制性理解，这限制了模型在长页OCR、多页记忆QA等任务中的性能提升。
AI.method: AGAR是一种无需训练、模型无关的方法，它利用VLM自身中后层的注意力机制识别top-K重要的视觉补丁，将这些补丁映射回文本跨度，然后重新渲染页面以放大这些关键跨度，最后重新推理答案。
AI.result: 在九个VTC基准测试（包括短文本、长上下文和多页记忆QA）以及四个VLM主干模型上的大量实验表明，AGAR作为即插即用的增强模块能一致性地提升现有VLM的性能，可与VLM后训练组合以获取进一步增益，并且在视觉和文本侧的输入退化下保持鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: VLM在VTC任务中表现出"定位而不利用"的注意力机制——证据定位注意力在中后层显著出现但与答案正确性基本解耦，而仅需放大渲染页面上的定位跨度即可恢复大部分失败案例，这为理解VLM内部机理和设计高效的推理时增强策略提供了重要启示。

title: GeoNatureAgent Benchmark: Benchmarking LLM Agents for Environmental Geospatial Analysis Across Frontier and Open-Weight Foundation Models
comment: Preprint. 10 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to ACM SIGSPATIAL 2026
summary: Environmental scientists spend disproportionate effort on data wrangling rather than analysis, and AI agents that automate geospatial workflows remain unvalidated: no benchmark evaluates agents operating through structured tool calling against real APIs. We introduce the GeoNatureAgent Benchmark, the first benchmark for environmental analysis agents that operate via structured tool calls to a production-style geospatial API. It comprises 93 tasks across 18 categories, covering municipality analysis, multi-turn conversation, spatial reasoning, cross-indicator synthesis, error handling and recovery, ranking, comparison, multilingual understanding, habitat analysis, and task rejection. Tasks are evaluated against an open, self-hostable API serving three environmental indicators across Spain and Portugal via sixteen tools. We evaluate seven LLMs (Claude Sonnet 4, DeepSeek V3.2, GLM-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, Qwen3-235B, GPT-OSS-120B, Llama 4 Scout) under three temperature-1.0 seeds, reporting capability and per-case cost as orthogonal axes. We find: (1) Claude Sonnet 4 leads at 60.8% +/- 0.8%, followed by DeepSeek V3.2 at 56.3% +/- 3.1%, with no other model above 51%; (2) the cost-accuracy Pareto frontier is occupied mostly by open-weight models, with DeepSeek V3.2 offering 93% of Claude's capability at 11x lower cost ($0.011/case); (3) comparison tasks remain universally unsolved (0% on close-value comparisons), exposing systematic reasoning limits; and (4) structured tool calling against a real API is more discriminative than general-purpose GIS benchmarks, with accuracies 25-35 points lower. We further show extensibility by integrating BigEarthNet V2 land cover for Portugal alongside Spanish CO2 and erosion indicators. The benchmark, harness, and self-hostable API are publicly available.

AI.tldr: GeoNatureAgent Benchmark 是首个针对通过结构化工具调用真实地理空间 API 的环境分析智能体设计的基准测试，包含93个任务覆盖18个类别，评估了7个 LLM 的表现，发现 Claude Sonnet 4 以60.8%准确率领先，但开源模型 DeepSeek V3.2 以11倍更低成本达到其93%的能力，同时揭示了比较推理任务的系统性瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 环境科学家在数据整理上耗费过多精力，而能够自动化地理空间工作流的 AI 智能体尚未得到有效验证：现有基准测试缺乏对智能体通过结构化工具调用操作真实 API 的能力评估，这一空白阻碍了该类系统在实际环境分析中的应用落地。
AI.method: 构建了 GeoNatureAgent Benchmark，包含93个任务（18个类别），涵盖行政区分析、多轮对话、空间推理、跨指标综合、错误处理与恢复、排序、比较、多语言理解、栖息地分析和任务拒绝等维度；任务基于一个开源自部署 API（16个工具，覆盖西班牙和葡萄牙的三个环境指标）进行评估，并集成 BigEarthNet V2 土地覆盖数据扩展了葡萄牙的评估能力。
AI.result: 评估了7个 LLM（Claude Sonnet 4, DeepSeek V3.2, GLM-5, Gemini 2.5 Pro, Qwen3-235B, GPT-OSS-120B, Llama 4 Scout），在 temperature=1.0 的三个种子下报告准确率和单案例成本：Claude Sonnet 4 以60.8%±0.8%领先，DeepSeek V3.2 以56.3%±3.1%紧随其后，其余模型均低于51%；成本-准确率帕累托前沿主要由开源模型占据，DeepSeek V3.2 以11倍更低成本（$0.011/案例）达到 Claude 93% 的能力；比较任务在数值相近时完全无法解决（0%），结构化工具调用准确率比通用 GIS 基准低25-35个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 该基准表明结构化工具调用真实 API 比通用 GIS 基准更具区分度（准确率差距达25-35个百分点），揭示了当前 LLM 在环境分析任务中的系统性局限（尤其是比较推理）；开源模型在成本-性能权衡上占据优势，为未来研究提供了标准化评估框架和可扩展的公开资源。

title: SkillCAT: Contrastive Assessment and Topology-Aware Skill Self-Evolution for LLM Agents
summary: Skill self-evolution methods for LLM agents aim to turn execution trajectories into reusable skill documents, but current pipelines typically learn from one trajectory per task, merge candidate skill patches before checking them, and load the full skill corpus before inference. We propose SkillCAT, a training-free framework that separates this process into three stages. Contrastive Causal Extraction (CCE) samples multiple trajectories for each task and compares same-task success/failure pairs to identify evidence that explains outcome differences. Assessment-Augmented Evolution (AAE) replays each candidate patch on source-task clones and keeps only patches that improve or preserve task outcomes before hierarchical skill patch merging. Topology-Aware Task Execution (TTE) compiles the evolved skills into a routable sub-skill topology, so inference loads only the capability nodes relevant to the task. We evaluate SkillCAT on common agent benchmarks, including SpreadsheetBench, WikiTableQuestions, and DocVQA, and further test cross-model and out-of-distribution generalization. Across these settings, SkillCAT raises the average score over baselines by up to 40.40%, demonstrating reliable skill evolution without model training.

AI.tldr: SkillCAT 是一个无需训练的技能自进化框架，通过对比因果提取、评估增强进化和拓扑感知任务执行三个模块，显著提升了 LLM 智能体在多个基准上的任务执行性能。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 智能体的技能自进化方法存在三方面不足：每个任务仅从单条轨迹学习、候选技能补丁在未经验证前直接合并、推理时需加载完整技能语料库，导致技能进化效率低且可靠性不足。
AI.method: SkillCAT 提出三阶段无训练框架：对比因果提取（CCE）为每个任务采样多条轨迹并对比同任务成功/失败配对以识别因果证据；评估增强进化（AAE）在源任务克隆上回放每个候选补丁，仅保留能改善或维持结果的补丁后进行层次化合并；拓扑感知任务执行（TTE）将进化后的技能编译为可路由的子技能拓扑，推理时仅加载与任务相关的能力节点。
AI.result: 在 SpreadsheetBench、WikiTableQuestions 和 DocVQA 等智能体基准上，SkillCAT 相较于基线方法平均性能提升最高达 40.40%，并在跨模型和分布外泛化测试中均展现出可靠的技能进化能力。
AI.conclusion: SkillCAT 证明了一种无需模型训练的轻量级技能自进化范式可行，其核心在于通过多轨迹对比、评估验证和拓扑路由来提升技能补丁的质量与推理效率，为 LLM 智能体的持续能力提升提供了新方向。

title: Multi-Label Test-Time Adaptation with Bayesian Conditional Priors
summary: Multi-label recognition with frozen Vision-Language Models (VLMs) is brittle under distribution shift: standard zero-shot inference scores labels independently, ignoring co-occurrence structure and producing incoherent label sets where dominant concepts suppress weaker but compatible labels. We introduce Bayesian Conditional Priors (BCP) Estimation, a gradient-free test-time adaptation method that injects label dependency without tuning the backbone. BCP views zero-shot logits as a proxy for marginal posteriors under a fixed image-text likelihood and attributes shift-induced errors mainly to a mismatched label prior. For each test image, it selects a high-confidence anchor label and applies an anchor-conditioned Bayesian refinement. This update is closed-form in logit space and admits a pointwise mutual information (PMI) interpretation, explicitly promoting compatible labels and suppressing incompatible ones. BCP operates without target annotations by estimating anchor-conditioned priors online from the unlabeled test stream via lightweight second-order co-occurrence statistics, adding negligible overhead beyond a single forward pass. Across standard multi-label benchmarks and multiple CLIP backbones, BCP consistently outperforms strong TTA baselines, e.g., improving RN50 average mAP from 57.31 to 69.22 and ViT-B/16 from 62.61 to 71.79.

AI.tldr: 提出贝叶斯条件先验估计（BCP），一种无需梯度的测试时自适应方法，通过估计图像的条件标签先验来注入标签依赖关系，在不微调视觉-语言模型骨干网络的情况下显著提升多标签识别在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于冻结视觉-语言模型（VLM）的多标签零样本识别方法在分布偏移下表现脆弱，因为标准零样本推理独立地对每个标签进行打分，忽略了标签之间的共现结构，导致主导概念抑制了兼容的弱标签，产生不连贯的预测标签集。
AI.method: BCP将零样本logits视为在固定图像-文本似然下的边际后验代理，将分布偏移引起的误差主要归因于标签先验的不匹配；对每个测试图像，先选择高置信度的锚标签，然后进行以锚为条件的贝叶斯修正，该更新在logit空间中有闭式解并可解释为点互信息（PMI），从而显式促进兼容标签并抑制不兼容标签；无需目标域标注，通过从无标签测试流中在线估计锚条件先验，仅需轻量级的二阶共现统计量，计算开销几乎等同于单次前向传播。
AI.result: 在标准多标签基准和多种CLIP骨干网络上，BCP一致优于强测试时自适应（TTA）基线，例如在RN50上将平均mAP从57.31提升至69.22，在ViT-B/16上从62.61提升至71.79。
AI.conclusion: 该方法表明，通过轻量级贝叶斯先验修正，无需微调或额外标注即可有效恢复VLM在多标签识别中的分布外泛化能力，标签依赖关系的显式建模是提升鲁棒性的关键。

title: Topical Phase Transitions in Artificial Intelligence Research: Large-Scale Evidence and an Early-Warning Signature for Emerging Topics
summary: Do research topics in artificial intelligence grow gradually, or do they advance through abrupt, detectable jumps? Analyzing 80,814 accepted main-track papers from five premier AI conferences (ACL, CVPR, ICLR, ICML, NeurIPS) spanning 2017 to 2025, we show major AI topics advance through topical phase transitions: remaining marginal for years, then surging across venues within one to three years. Large language models became the dominant cross-venue topic by 2025, diffusion models rose with comparable abruptness, and language-model methods crossed into computer vision via vision-language models, whereas reinforcement learning compounded smoothly, distinguishing genuine phase transitions from ordinary growth. This structure is our primary contribution: a large-scale, cross-venue characterization of how AI research reorganizes. We then ask whether a transition leaves a detectable footprint before it peaks. We define an early-warning signature, four publication-dynamics criteria frozen on 2017-2021 data, and evaluate it out of sample on 2023-2025 transitions, obtaining a precision of 27% and recall of 63% against a 13.5% base rate. Applied to 2025 data, the signature flags reasoning and test-time compute, agentic AI, multimodal LLMs, retrieval-augmented generation, and world models as topics to monitor over 2026-2028. The source code is also publicly available on GitHub at https://github.com/KurbanIntelligenceLab/ai-phase-transitions.

AI.tldr: 通过对2017-2025年间五大顶级AI会议80,814篇论文的分析，研究发现AI研究主题通过“主题相变”——长期边缘化后在1-3年内爆发式涌现——而非渐进式增长来推进；并提出了一个基于出版动力学准则的早期预警信号，能够以27%的精度和63%的召回率提前识别即将到来的相变。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对AI领域的发展轨迹多基于定性观察或单一会议分析，缺乏跨会议、大规模、定量化的研究来揭示不同AI研究主题的演变模式，特别是缺乏对主题从边缘到主流这一“相变”过程的系统刻画及其可预测性评估。
AI.method: 收集五大AI会议（ACL、CVPR、ICLR、ICML、NeurIPS）2017-2025年的80,814篇录用主会论文；定义主题相变的概念并基于论文主题分布的时间演化进行刻画；提出一套基于出版动力学（publication dynamics）的四个早期预警准则，使用2017-2021年数据拟合，在2023-2025年的相变上进行样本外评估。
AI.result: 大型语言模型在2025年成为跨会议的支配性主题，扩散模型同样以突增方式崛起，语言模型方法通过视觉-语言模型进入计算机视觉领域，而强化学习则呈现平滑增长；早期预警签名在13.5%基线下达到27%精度和63%召回率；该签名将推理与测试时计算、自主智能体、多模态LLM、检索增强生成和世界模型标记为2026-2028年需监测的主题。
AI.conclusion: AI研究主题的发展并非渐进式，而是经历可检测的相变过程，这一发现为理解AI学科演化提供了新视角；基于出版动力学的早期预警签名虽精度有限但能有效提升对相变的识别能力，为科研战略制定和研究方向预测提供了定量工具。

title: From Passive Generation to Investigation: A Proactive Scientific Peer Review Agent
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in automating scientific peer review. However, existing approaches often struggle to generate in-depth reviews supported by concrete evidence. We argue that a key limitation is the lack of flexibility to proactively investigate suspicious parts of a paper based on accumulated evidence, as human reviewers do. In this paper, we explore how to enable an LLM-based review agent to perform such proactive investigation. We find that this can be naturally formulated as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), and propose ProReviewer, a scientific peer review agent that proactively reviews a paper guided by a maintained, structured review log. The structured review log serves as a workspace for the agent to track evidence and intermediate findings collected during review. Experiments show that ProReviewer with an 8B backbone, trained by supervised fine-tuning and optimized by reinforcement learning, achieves the highest average score across five quality dimensions, outperforming prompt-based methods with much larger frontier LLMs by up to 39% and the strongest fine-tuned baseline by 16% relatively. It also attains the highest win rates against baselines in human evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出ProReviewer，一种基于MDP框架的LLM科学同行评审智能体，通过维护结构化评审日志实现主动调查式审查，在五个质量维度上平均得分最高，以8B模型超越包括更大前沿LLM在内的多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的自动化科学同行评审方法难以生成有具体证据支持的深度评审，其关键局限性在于缺乏像人类评审者那样根据积累的证据主动调查论文可疑部分的能力。
AI.method: 将LLM评审智能体的主动调查过程形式化为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），提出ProReviewer框架，该智能体通过维护一个结构化评审日志作为工作空间来追踪评审过程中收集的证据和中间发现，采用8B基座模型，经过监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL）优化训练。
AI.result: ProReviewer在五个质量维度上平均得分最高，相比基于提示的更大前沿LLM方法提升高达39%，相比最强的微调基线方法相对提升16%，并在人工评估中取得了最高的胜率。
AI.conclusion: 将主动调查式评审形式化为MDP并结合结构化评审日志是提升LLM评审智能体性能的有效途径，较小的模型经过适当的训练策略也能超越更大的模型，表明方法设计和训练范式比模型规模更为关键。

title: MAMVI: 3D Test-Time Adaptation via Masked Multi-View Point Clouds
summary: 3D point cloud models suffer significant performance degradation under distribution shifts caused by sensor noise, occlusions, and environmental changes. Test-time adaptation (TTA) has emerged as a practical paradigm for mitigating this issue during inference. Recently, leveraging multi-view augmentation has shown promise in improving 3D TTA performance. However, existing multi-view approaches are often constrained by sequential optimization that treats each view independently. This sequential optimization leads to substantial inference latency due to repetitive optimization steps, making real-time adaptation impractical. To address this, we propose Masked Multi-View Test-Time Adaptation (MAMVI), which replaces sequential optimization with a unified single-step adaptation. Specifically, MAMVI utilizes a hybrid masking strategy that combines fixed ratios for stability with Beta-distributed sampling for diversity. By aggregating losses across multiple views, MAMVI performs adaptation through a single backward pass based on multi-view consensus. Additionally, a confidence-based adaptive learning rate is used to dynamically adjust the adaptation intensity for each sample. Extensive experiments on ModelNet-40C, ShapeNet-C, and ScanObjectNN-C demonstrate that MAMVI achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on ShapeNet-C and ScanObjectNN-C. Moreover, it remains competitive on ModelNet-40C while delivering 4.9-8.9 times faster inference, making it highly suitable for real-time applications. Our code is available at https://github.com/Inseok-kong/MAMVI

AI.tldr: 提出MAMVI方法，通过混合掩码策略和单步多视图聚合优化，替代传统顺序多视图优化，在三维点云测试时自适应中实现4.9-8.9倍加速，并在ShapeNet-C和ScanObjectNN-C上达到最优精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多视图增强的三维点云测试时自适应方法采用顺序优化，每个视图独立处理，导致推理延迟高、难以满足实时应用需求。
AI.method: 提出MAMVI框架，核心设计包括：混合掩码策略（固定比例掩码保证稳定性+基于Beta分布的采样掩码增强多样性）；通过多视图损失聚合进行单步反向传播实现统一自适应；以及基于置信度的自适应学习率动态调整每个样本的适应强度。
AI.result: 在ModelNet-40C, ShapeNet-C和ScanObjectNN-C三个基准上评估，MAMVI在ShapeNet-C和ScanObjectNN-C上取得最优精度，在ModelNet-40C上保持竞争力，同时实现了4.9-8.9倍的推理加速。
AI.conclusion: MAMVI通过单步多视图聚合替代顺序优化，在保持甚至提升自适应精度的同时大幅降低推理延迟，证明了其在实时三维点云测试时自适应中的实用性和有效性。

title: (Human) Attention Is (Still) All You Need: Human oversight makes AI-assisted social science reliable
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for tasks once reserved for trained researchers, including hypothesis generation, specification choice, and drafting conclusions. We argue that the reliability of AI-assisted research depends not only on model capability, but also on how cognitive labour is structured between humans and machines. We study this problem through Human-in-the-Loop Economic Research (HLER), a decision architecture based on pre-commitment, decision sequencing, accountability, and attention allocation. In a pre-specified 2*4 factorial experiment with 280 complete research runs across four datasets, an unconstrained multi-agent baseline produced critical failures in 72% of runs. Using the same underlying model, the same agent decomposition, and identical prompts for the shared reasoning agents, HLER reduced the failure rate to 16% by imposing three architectural commitments: LLMs reason but do not execute data work, data and estimation are handled deterministically, and three human decision gates bind the workflow. Fisher's exact test rejects equality of failure rates at p<0.001. Reliability gains were largest on the least publicly represented dataset, a Qing-dynasty population register, consistent with a task-based production model with Frechet-distributed output quality. An 80-run ablation suggests that deterministic computation and human gates contribute independently, with exploratory evidence of complementarity. We interpret HLER as a research harness rather than an autonomous AI scientist: it sharply reduces failures, makes residual weaknesses more visible, and prevents unreliable claims from being advanced as publication-ready outputs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了人类参与的经济研究（HLER）框架，通过预承诺、决策序列化、问责制和注意力分配三种架构性约束，将多智能体LLM系统的关键失败率从72%降至16%，证明AI辅助研究的可靠性不仅取决于模型能力，更取决于人机认知劳动的结构化设计。
AI.motivation: LLM正越来越多地被用于假设生成、规范选择和结论草拟等传统上由训练有素的研究人员完成的任务，但AI辅助研究的可靠性不仅取决于模型能力，还取决于人机之间的认知劳动如何结构化，现有方法缺乏对这种分工架构的系统性研究。
AI.method: 研究通过人类参与的经济研究（HLER）框架实现，该框架基于预承诺、决策序列化、问责制和注意力分配四项原则，具体施加三项架构约束：LLM负责推理但不执行数据工作，数据和估计以确定性方式处理，三个关键人类决策门控点绑定整个工作流。实验采用预注册的2×4因子设计，在四个数据集上进行280次完整研究运行，并进行了80次消融实验。
AI.result: 无约束的多智能体基线在280次运行中产生72%的关键失败率，而使用相同底层模型、相同智能体分解和相同提示词的HLER将失败率降低至16%，Fisher精确检验拒绝失败率相等假设（p<0.001）。可靠性提升幅度最大的数据集是清代人口登记册这一公开代表性最低的数据集，消融实验表明确定性计算和人类门控独立贡献且存在互补性证据。
AI.conclusion: HLER应被理解为一个研究约束框架（research harness）而非自主AI科学家，它显著降低失败率、使残余弱点更可见，并防止不可靠的结论被作为可发表的输出提出，凸显了从系统层面设计人机分工架构对AI辅助研究可靠性的关键意义。

title: S-GBT: Smooth Growth Bound Tensor for Certified Robustness Against Word Substitution Attacks in NLP
comment: The paper has been accepted at NETYS 2026 - 14th edition of the International Conference on Networked Systems
summary: Despite recent progress in Natural Language Processing (NLP), models remain vulnerable to word substitution attacks. Most existing defenses focus on first order sensitivity and measure how much the output changes when the input is slightly perturbed. However, they ignore how this sensitivity evolves, which is described by curvature. When gradients vary sharply, models can still fail. This paper introduces the Smooth Growth Bound Tensor (S-GBT), a second order method that bounds the Hessian element-wise, for which we provide formal theoretical proofs on the resulting robustness bounds. A regularization term is added during training to minimize these bounds. This yields tighter certified robustness against word substitution attacks. The change in the output under word substitution is bounded by both a linear term and a quadratic term. S-GBT is derived for two architectures: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN). The method is integrated directly into the training objective. Its effectiveness is evaluated on multiple benchmark datasets. The results show that combining first and second order regularization improves certified robust accuracy by up to 23.4% compared to prior methods, while clean accuracy remains competitive. These findings indicate that controlling both the gradient and its variation is a promising direction for building more robust models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Smooth Growth Bound Tensor (S-GBT)，一种基于二阶信息（Hessian矩阵元素级上界）的鲁棒性正则化方法，用于防御自然语言处理中的词替换攻击。实验表明，结合一阶与二阶正则化可将认证鲁棒准确率提升高达23.4%，同时保持干净准确率竞争力。
AI.motivation: 现有针对词替换攻击的防御方法主要关注一阶敏感性（梯度），忽略了敏感性随输入变化的趋势（即曲率信息）。当梯度变化剧烈时，即使梯度本身被控制，模型仍可能失效。本文旨在填补这一空白，引入二阶方法以更全面地刻画并提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 本文提出Smooth Growth Bound Tensor (S-GBT)，一种对Hessian矩阵进行元素级上界估计的二阶方法，并提供了形式化的鲁棒性界理论证明。S-GBT分别针对LSTM和CNN两种架构进行推导，并在训练目标中加入正则化项以最小化这些上界，从而同时约束输出变化的线性项（一阶）和二次项（二阶）。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，结合一阶与二阶正则化的方法相比先前方法，认证鲁棒准确率提升了高达23.4%，同时干净样本准确率保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 本文研究表明，同时控制梯度的幅度（一阶）及其变化程度（二阶）是构建更鲁棒模型的有效方向。S-GBT将二阶信息直接融入训练目标，为对抗防御提供了新的理论视角与实践工具。

title: Efficient, Robust, and Anti-Collusion Fingerprinting of Image Diffusion Models
summary: Model fingerprinting, embedding user-specific identifiers (fingerprints) into generated outputs, has recently emerged as a popular solution to protect the intellectual property rights (IPR) of generative text-to-image (T2I) models and prevent unauthorized redistribution. In this work, we reveal a previously unexplored systematic vulnerability in existing generative model fingerprinting methods: they lack robustness against collusion attacks, where multiple attackers combine their models to remove or obscure the fingerprints. To address this issue, we take the first step towards a robust fingerprinting method for T2I models with anti-collusion capabilities. The proposed method encodes strings of bits, namely fingerprints, into the coefficients of a personalized normalization module (PNM) incorporated into T2I models, so that fingerprints can be reliably recovered from any generated image. To defend against collusion attacks and prevent unauthorized model redistribution, we introduce an anti-collusion mechanism based on lossless function-invariant parameter transformations. This mechanism significantly degrades the image generation quality of colluded models, making them effectively unusable. Moreover, our method allows developers to efficiently create multiple copies of fingerprinted T2I models by reparameterizing the PNM without the need for retraining. We also introduce a worst-case optimization strategy to improve robustness against model-level attacks. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed method achieves high fidelity and robustness across multiple T2I image generation and editing tasks, with fingerprint extraction accuracy exceeding 99.5%. Compared with existing methods, our method demonstrates, for the first time, a notable proactive robustness to collusion attacks by significantly increasing the FID of colluded models.

AI.tldr: 本文首次揭示现有生成式模型指纹方法在面对共谋攻击时缺乏鲁棒性，并提出一种面向文本到图像模型的具有抗共谋能力的鲁棒指纹方法，通过个性化归一化模块编码指纹并引入基于无损函数不变参数变换的抗共谋机制，实现了超过99.5%的指纹提取准确率并显著增加共谋模型的FID。
AI.motivation: 现有生成式文本到图像模型的指纹方法用于保护知识产权和防止未授权再分发，但被发现存在系统性的安全漏洞：它们缺乏对共谋攻击的鲁棒性，即多个攻击者联合其模型可以移除或混淆指纹，这一问题此前未被系统性地探索过。
AI.method: 提出将指纹位串编码到个性化归一化模块（PNM）的系数中，并将其嵌入T2I模型，使得指纹可从任何生成图像中可靠恢复；引入基于无损函数不变参数变换的抗共谋机制，该机制会显著降低共谋模型的图像生成质量，使其不可用；此外，通过重参数化PNM实现高效创建多个带指纹的模型副本而无需重新训练，并采用最坏情况优化策略提升对模型级攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在多个T2I图像生成和编辑任务上，该方法实现了高保真度和鲁棒性，指纹提取准确率超过99.5%；与现有方法相比，该方法首次在对共谋攻击的主动鲁棒性上取得显著效果，能够大幅提升共谋模型的FID（弗雷歇初始距离），使其生成质量严重退化。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了现有指纹方法在共谋攻击下的脆弱性，并提出了一种具备抗共谋能力的鲁棒指纹框架，为T2I模型的知识产权保护提供了新的技术路径；所提出的机制不仅保持了高精度指纹提取，还能主动惩罚共谋行为，具有重要的实际应用价值和未来研究方向。

title: HarnessBridge: Learnable Bidirectional Controller for LLM Agent Harness
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as agents for long-horizon tasks, yet their performance is shaped not only by model capability and environment design, but also by the harness that mediates agent--environment interaction. Existing harnesses are largely manually engineered, making them difficult to scale as trajectories grow longer and interactions become more complex. In this work, we ask whether harness can be generated by a learnable plug-in module that can be trained in an end-to-end fashion. We introduce HarnessBridge, a lightweight learnable harness controller that parameterizes the agent--environment interface as a bidirectional projection. HarnessBridge learns two bidirectional projections: observation projection, which distills raw trajectories into compact, decision-relevant states, and action projection, which converts proposed actions into executable transitions or trajectory-grounded rejections. We train HarnessBridge on a harness supervision dataset via unified instruction tuning. On Terminal-Bench~2.0 and SWE-bench Verified, HarnessBridge matches or surpasses strong specialized harnesses while substantially reducing token usage and trajectory length, and generalizes from smaller generators to larger commercial models.

AI.tldr: HarnessBridge是一种轻量级可学习的智能体-环境接口控制器，通过双向投影参数化观测和动作空间，在终端任务和软件工程基准上匹配或超越专用人工设计框架，同时显著降低token开销和轨迹长度。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型智能体的性能不仅取决于模型能力和环境设计，还依赖于连接智能体与环境的"harness"（框架）。当前这些框架主要依赖人工设计，难以随着轨迹长度增长和交互复杂性增加而有效扩展，亟需一种可学习、可端到端训练的替代方案。
AI.method: HarnessBridge是一个轻量级可学习的框架控制器，将智能体-环境接口参数化为双向投影。它学习两种投影：观测投影将原始轨迹蒸馏为紧凑的决策相关状态，动作投影将提议的动作转换为可执行的动作或基于轨迹的拒绝。该模型通过统一指令微调在框架监督数据集上进行训练。
AI.result: 在Terminal-Bench 2.0和SWE-bench Verified基准上，HarnessBridge匹配甚至超越了强专用人工设计框架，同时大幅减少了token使用量和轨迹长度，并且能够从较小的生成器泛化到更大的商业模型。
AI.conclusion: HarnessBridge证明了可学习框架控制器的有效性，表明智能体-环境接口可以通过端到端训练的方式自动学习，从而替代人工设计的框架。该方法在提升性能的同时显著降低计算开销，并展现出良好的跨模型泛化能力，为大规模智能体部署提供了更可扩展的接口解决方案。

title: Leveraging Audio-LLMs to Filter Speech-to-Speech Training Data
summary: Large-scale mined corpora provide abundant training data for end-to-end speech-to-speech translation (S2ST) but may contain noise, misalignment, and semantic errors. Filtering noisy data is crucial to maintain robust speech translation performance. We study how to train an audio-language model to make keep/drop decisions on paired speech directly from audio. To obtain reliable supervision without manual labels, we adopt a scalable two-stage Rank-to-Distill strategy. A lightweight ranker generates keep/drop pseudo-labels from noisy speech pairs, then trains an audio large language model to predict keep/drop directly from raw paired speech. The resulting model jointly captures acoustic fidelity and cross-lingual semantic consistency for the selection of speech-conditioned data. Experiments on CVSS-C and SpeechMatrix show consistent improvements over unfiltered training, yielding up to +1.4 ASR-BLEU for end-to-end S2ST.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Rank-to-Distill策略，通过两阶段方式训练音频大语言模型对语音数据进行质量筛选，无需人工标注即可提升端到端语音翻译性能，在CVSS-C和SpeechMatrix上取得最高+1.4 ASR-BLEU的提升。
AI.motivation: 大规模挖掘的语料库为端到端语音到语音翻译提供了丰富训练数据，但其中普遍存在噪声、错位和语义错误，而如何有效过滤这些低质量数据是提升翻译鲁棒性的关键挑战。
AI.method: 采用可扩展的两阶段Rank-to-Distill策略：首先训练一个轻量级排序器从噪声语音对生成keep/drop伪标签，然后利用这些伪标签训练一个音频大语言模型直接从原始配对语音中预测keep/drop决策。该模型能够联合捕捉声学保真度和跨语言语义一致性，实现基于语音条件的数据选择。
AI.result: 在CVSS-C和SpeechMatrix数据集上的实验表明，该方法相较于未过滤训练数据取得了一致的性能提升，端到端语音翻译的ASR-BLEU指标最高提升+1.4。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明通过自监督方式训练音频大语言模型直接对语音数据进行质量筛选是可行且有效的，无需人工标注即可自动过滤噪声数据，为大规模构建高质量语音翻译训练集提供了实用方案。

title: Objects Before Words: Object-First Inductive Biases for Grounding Language in Child-View Video
summary: Learning grounded word meaning from natural experience requires resolving two ambiguities in infant-view recordings: when the named referent appears and where it is in a cluttered frame. In SAYCam-style data, caregiver speech is sparse and weakly synchronized with egocentric video, so single-frame contrastive pairing yields noisy positives in which the intended object is absent or entangled with distractors. We propose BabyMind, an object-first bias for child-view contrastive learning under sparse, noisy supervision.
