BabyMind extracts candidate object embeddings using an offline mask-based region interface, links candidates across a short utterance-centered window into lightweight object files via tracking, and aligns utterances to bags of object files with a prototype-space multiple-instance contrastive objective. Track-coherence and global-object agreement regularizers stabilize learning and transfer object-file structure into the global frame embedding used at evaluation. On SAYCam-S, BabyMind improves Labeled-S 15 forced-choice accuracy by +2.6 points over CVCL and yields consistent gains on in-vocabulary out-of-distribution benchmarks. Code is available at https://github.com/sathiiii/BabyMind.

AI.tldr: BabyMind提出了一种面向婴儿视角对比学习的物体优先偏置方法，通过离线掩码区域接口提取候选物体嵌入、基于追踪将窗口内物体关联为轻量级物体文件、以及使用原型空间多实例对比目标将话语与物体文件袋对齐，在SAYCam-S上提升了标签选择的准确率。
AI.motivation: 婴儿视角记录中，看护者言语稀疏且与自我中心视频弱同步，单帧对比配对会产生噪声正样本（目标物体缺失或被干扰物干扰），使得从自然经验中学习接地词汇含义面临"何时出现"和"何地存在"的双重歧义问题。
AI.method: BabyMind采用物体优先偏置，首先利用离线掩码区域接口提取候选物体嵌入，通过追踪将短话语窗口内的候选物体关联为轻量级物体文件，然后使用原型空间多实例对比目标将话语与物体文件袋对齐，并引入轨道一致性和全局物体一致性正则化项来稳定学习并将物体文件结构迁移到全局帧嵌入中。
AI.result: 在SAYCam-S数据集上，BabyMind在Labeled-S 15项二选一准确率上比CVCL提升了2.6个百分点，并在词内分布外基准测试上取得了一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了在稀疏、噪声监督条件下，引入物体优先偏置和多实例对比学习能够有效提升婴儿视角下词汇接地学习的效果，且物体文件结构可成功迁移到全局嵌入表征中。

title: Zero-source LLM Hallucination Detection with Human-like Criteria Probing
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often hallucinate by generating factually incorrect or unfaithful content, posing significant risks to their safe use. Detecting such hallucinations is particularly challenging under the zero-source constraint, where no model internals or external references are available, and detection must rely solely on the textual query-answer pair. In this paper, we propose Human-like Criteria Probing for Hallucination Detection (HCPD), a paradigm that emulates the multi-faceted reasoning of human evaluators. Its core is a Human-like Criteria Probing (HCP) mechanism, in which a LLM agent adaptively decomposes its judgment into a weighted set of interpretable criteria and aggregates criterion-specific scores into a final truthfulness measure. To achieve this adaptive capability, we introduce a reward-based alignment scheme using only weak supervision from semantic consistency. At inference, we employ a multi-sampling aggregation strategy to ensure robust decisions while preserving full interpretability. We further provide theoretical analysis supporting the reliability of our approach. Extensive experiments show that HCPD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, offering an effective and explainable solution for zero-source hallucination detection. Code is available at https://github.com/TRISKEL10N/HCPD.

AI.tldr: 提出HCPD框架，通过模拟人类多维度推理的可解释准则探测机制，结合奖励对齐与多采样聚合策略，在仅依赖查询-答案对的零源约束下实现高效且可解释的幻觉检测。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLM）生成的幻觉内容（事实错误或不忠实内容）严重威胁其安全使用。在零源约束下（无模型内部状态或外部参考可用），仅凭文本查询-答案对进行幻觉检测极具挑战性，现有方法缺乏可解释的多维推理能力。
AI.method: 提出Human-like Criteria Probing for Hallucination Detection (HCPD)框架，其核心是Human-like Criteria Probing (HCP)机制：LLM智能体自适应地将判决分解为一组带权重的可解释准则，并聚合各准则分数得到最终真实性度量。通过基于语义一致性的弱监督奖励对齐实现自适应能力，推理时采用多采样聚合策略确保鲁棒性并保持完全可解释性。还提供了理论分析支持方法可靠性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，HCPD在零源幻觉检测任务上持续优于现有最先进基线方法，在性能与可解释性上均取得显著优势。代码已开源在GitHub上。
AI.conclusion: HCPD通过模拟人类评估者的多面推理、引入可解释准则探测与弱监督对齐机制，为零源约束下的幻觉检测提供了一种高效、可解释且理论基础扎实的解决方案，为LLM安全使用提供了重要保障。

title: ArogyaSutra: A Multi-Agent Framework for Multimodal Medical Reasoning in Indic Languages
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown promising reasoning capabilities in general domains, yet their performance remains limited in specialized settings such as healthcare, especially in multilingual and low-resource scenarios. This gap is critical in regions like rural India, where patients often express complex medical queries in native Indic languages and rely on multimodal inputs such as medical images. Existing English-centric MLLMs struggle to support such use cases, limiting equitable access to AI-driven healthcare assistance. To address this challenge, we introduce ArogyaBodha, a large-scale multilingual multimodal medical question-answer dataset constructed from eight heterogeneous sources, covering 31 body systems, six imaging modalities, and 21 clinical domains across English and seven major Indian languages. We further propose ArogyaSutra, an actor-critic-based multi-agent framework that integrates tool grounding with dual-memory mechanisms for step-wise, reasoning-aware decision making, and uses stored actor-critic simulation trajectories for distillation. Experiments show that our dataset and framework improve multilingual medical reasoning accuracy across all Indic languages, with ablations validating the contribution of each component. The source code and dataset are available at: https://iitp-cse.github.io/ ArogyaSutra/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ArogyaBodha数据集和ArogyaSutra多智能体框架，用于提升多语言多模态医学推理能力，实验证明其在多种印度语言上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态大语言模型在通用领域表现良好，但在医疗等专业场景中性能有限，尤其是在多语言和低资源环境下。这一问题在印度农村等地区尤为突出，患者通常用本土语言表达复杂医疗问题并依赖医学图像等模态输入，而现有以英语为中心的MLLMs无法有效支持这些场景，限制了AI辅助医疗的公平可及性。
AI.method: 本文构建了ArogyaBodha大规模多语言多模态医学问答数据集，涵盖8个异构来源、31个身体系统、6种成像模态和21个临床领域，支持英语及7种主要印度语言。同时提出ArogyaSutra，一个基于演员-评论家范式的多智能体框架，集成工具调用与双记忆机制以实现逐步推理感知决策，并利用存储的演员-评论家仿真轨迹进行蒸馏。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出的数据集和框架在所有印度语言上均提升了多语言医学推理准确率，消融实验验证了各组件（数据集、多智能体框架、双记忆机制、蒸馏轨迹）的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了面向多语言低资源医疗场景构建专用数据集和推理框架的有效性，表明通过多智能体协作与记忆增强机制可显著提升MLLMs在多语言医疗推理中的表现，为AI驱动的公平医疗可及性提供了可行路径。

title: Diffusion Transformer World-Action Model for AV Scene Prediction
summary: Action-conditioned world models let an autonomous vehicle predict future camera scenes from its own planned controls, enabling planning and simulation without real-world rollouts, but at compact, trainable scale the futures are ambiguous and the field's standard distortion metrics actively mislead: they reward a blurry regression mean over a realistic prediction. We confront this with a compact latent world model that, given the present front-camera latent and a sequence of ego-actions, predicts future scene latents a frozen decoder renders to $256 \times 256$ frames up to 8 seconds ahead, evaluated on 150 held-out nuScenes scenes. We first benchmark where to predict: across six frozen encoders spanning four representation families, V-JEPA2 with temporal context reduces steering RMSE by 40% over the best single-frame encoder. We then train a latent Diffusion Transformer (DiT) and, through a controlled diagnosis, identify the four ingredients it needs: spatial tokens, the $x_0$ objective, residual anchoring, and sampling matched to target uncertainty. In a Stable-Diffusion-VAE encode-predict-decode pipeline we expose the central tension: distortion metrics (cosine similarity, SSIM) favor the blurry mean, masking that the diffusion model is far closer to the real frame distribution. Inception-based FID and KID reveal a clean perception-distortion frontier: diffusion attains KID 0.078 versus 0.375 for regression ($4.8\times$ better), and a deployable train-derived calibration makes this practical without test-time ground truth. The model is genuinely action-controllable (steering drives scene displacement, Spearman $ρ= 0.81$, vs $-0.18$ for regression). We trace limited single-pass motion to a shared-present anchor and engineer a compact 1.7M-parameter "jump" model that recovers full ground-truth motion magnitude ($1.02\times$ GT), where single-pass models capture less than half.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个紧凑的潜在世界模型，用于自动驾驶中基于动作条件的前置摄像头场景预测，并揭示传统失真指标（如SSIM、余弦相似度）会误导地奖励模糊的回归均值，而扩散模型在感知指标（FID/KID）上显著优于回归模型（KID 0.078 vs 0.375，提升4.8倍），同时实现真实动作可控性（转向位移Spearman ρ=0.81）。
AI.motivation: 现有动作条件世界模型在紧凑可训练规模下预测未来场景存在歧义性，且传统失真评估指标（如SSIM、余弦相似度）会误导性地奖励模糊的回归均值而非真实感预测，导致质量评估与实际视觉效果严重偏差，亟需一种能产出真实感、可动作控制的未来帧预测方法及与之匹配的评估体系。
AI.method: 构建了一个紧凑的潜在世界模型流水线：利用冻结编码器将当前前置摄像头帧编码为潜在表示，基于未来自车动作序列预测未来场景潜在表示，再通过冻结解码器渲染为256×256像素、最长8秒的未来帧；系统性地比较了六种冻结编码器（涵盖四种表征族），发现V-JEPA2结合时序上下文使转向RMSE降低40%；训练潜在扩散Transformer（DiT）并诊断出四个关键组件：空间token、x_0目标、残差锚定、匹配目标不确定性的采样；在Stable Diffusion VAE的编码-预测-解码流水线中揭示了感知-失真前沿的张力。
AI.result: 扩散模型在KID上达到0.078，回归模型为0.375（提升4.8倍）；扩散模型在转向位移上与真实值呈现强相关性（Spearman ρ=0.81），回归模型仅为-0.18；设计了一个1.7M参数的紧凑跳跃（jump）模型，可恢复完整的地面真实运动幅度（1.02× GT），而单次传播模型捕获量不到一半。
AI.conclusion: 该工作确立了感知指标（FID/KID）应作为评估生成式世界模型的核心标准，揭示了失真指标掩盖扩散模型真实优势的关键问题；提出了面向部署的可训练校准方法，无需测试时真实值即可实用化；指出当前单次传播模型因共享当前帧锚定而限制了运动幅度，并提供了有效的轻量级解决方案。

title: MDForge: Agentic Molecular Dynamics Pipeline Design under Sparse Simulator Feedback
summary: Molecular dynamics (MD) is the canonical in-silico method for atomistic molecular science, simulating molecular behavior from first-principle physics. Designing an MD pipeline for a new system requires substantial expert knowledge: running it on even one molecule is expensive, ruling out trial-and-error. We automate this expert pipeline-design process with an LLM agent. Unlike existing MD agents that orchestrate a predefined tool set, we treat pipeline design as open-ended code generation in which the agent's behavior is reshaped online by verbal reward. Specifically, we build MDForge, an LLM agent whose in-context update rule densifies the sparse reward via a multi-agent debate among physics experts. On three SAMPL host-guest binding free-energy benchmarks, MDForge automatically designs MD pipelines competitive with human experts. Deployed on a library of unseen candidate guests, its CB[7] pipeline discovers a novel binder that wet-lab competition NMR confirms is a high-affinity, picomolar CB[7] binder. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/Zehong-Wang/MDForge.

AI.tldr: 提出MDForge，一个基于LLM agent的框架，通过开放式代码生成和多智能体辩论将稀疏的专家口头奖励转化为稠密信号，自动为分子动力学流水线设计生成竞争性方案，并成功发现了一种新型高亲和力picomolar级别CB[7]结合物。
AI.motivation: 分子动力学（MD）作为原子级分子科学的关键计算方法，其流水线设计依赖大量专家知识，且针对单个分子运行成本高昂，无法通过试错方式优化，因此亟需一种自动化方法来替代人工专家完成MD流水线的设计。
AI.method: MDForge将MD流水线设计建模为开放式代码生成问题，LLM agent通过在线口头奖励（verbal reward）重塑其行为；具体采用多智能体辩论（multi-agent debate）机制将稀疏奖励稠密化，物理学专家角色通过辩论生成密集反馈信号以指导agent的在线更新。
AI.result: 在三个SAMPL主-客体结合自由能基准上，MDForge自动设计的MD流水线性能与人类专家相当；将其CB[7]流水线部署到未见过的候选客体库中，发现了一个新型结合物，竞争性湿实验NMR确认其为高亲和力、picomolar级别的CB[7]结合物。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明LLM agent能够通过开放式代码生成和奖励稠密化技术自动完成复杂科学流水线的端到端设计，其性能可达专家水平，且能够发现新型高亲和力分子结合物，为自动化计算化学研究提供了可行范式。

title: LabVLA: Grounding Vision-Language-Action Models in Scientific Laboratories
comment: Work in progress. Project website at https://zjunlp.github.io/LabVLA/
summary: Scientific laboratories increasingly rely on AI systems to reason about experiments, but the physical act of doing science remains largely outside their reach. AI can help read literature, generate hypotheses, and plan protocols, yet the execution of those protocols at the bench still requires a human operator. Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide one possible interface between written protocols and robot execution, but existing policies are trained mostly on household and tabletop demonstrations and rarely encounter the instruments, transparent liquids, or fixed protocol workflows found in scientific laboratories. Closing this gap requires both laboratory-specific supervision and a unified learning framework that can accommodate the diverse robot embodiments used to execute experimental protocols. We therefore identify data and embodiment as central bottlenecks alongside model design. To address the data side, we build RoboGenesis, a simulation-based workflow and data engine that composes configured laboratory workflows from atomic skills, validates and filters rollouts, and exports structured demonstrations across supported robot profiles. On the policy side, we present LabVLA, trained with a two-stage recipe: FAST action token pretraining first makes the Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct backbone action aware before any continuous control is learned, and flow matching posttraining then attaches a DiT action expert under knowledge insulation. On the LabUtopia benchmark, LabVLA achieves the highest average success rate among all evaluated baselines under both in-distribution and out-of-distribution settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LabVLA模型和RoboGenesis仿真数据引擎，通过FAST动作令牌预训练与流匹配后训练两阶段策略，解决科学实验室场景下视觉-语言-动作模型的领域适应问题，在LabUtopia基准上取得最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型主要基于家居和桌面场景数据训练，难以应对科学实验室中特有的仪器、透明液体和固定协议流程等复杂场景，且缺乏统一框架来适配科学实验中的多样化机器人形态，数据和具身形态成为核心瓶颈。
AI.method: 本文提出RoboGenesis仿真数据引擎，通过从原子技能组合配置化的实验室工作流、验证过滤并导出跨多种机器人形态的结构化演示数据；同时提出LabVLA模型，采用两阶段训练策略：第一阶段通过FAST动作令牌预训练使Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct骨干网络具备动作感知能力，第二阶段通过流匹配后训练在知识隔离条件下附加DiT动作专家模块。
AI.result: 在LabUtopia基准测试中，LabVLA在分布内和分布外两种设置下均取得了所有评估基线中最高的平均成功率。
AI.conclusion: 数据和具身形态是科学实验室VLA模型面临的核心瓶颈，通过仿真数据引擎和两阶段训练策略可有效弥合实验室特定监督与通用VLA模型之间的差距，为机器人自动执行科学实验协议提供了可行方案。

title: Quality-Preserving Imperceptible Adversarial Attack on Skeleton-based Human Action Recognition
summary: Adversarial attacks on skeletal human action recognition have received significant attention. However, existing methods typically introduce noise-like perturbations that degrade motion quality post-attack, and thereby are inherently perceptible with recent advancements in S-HAR systems. We discover that this degradation stems from the gap between empirical and true risks during the optimization process of previous adversarial attacks. To address this issue, we propose an attack where adversarial motions are obtained without compromising their motion quality. To minimize the risk gap and preserve motion quality, we propose a distribution-based adversarial attack method without introducing noise-like perturbations. To faithfully evaluate the motion quality, we propose a new metric that aligns with human perception on real-world naturalness. Experiments have been conducted on the state-of-the-art S-HAR methods across two datasets, demonstrating the superiority of our method in both the attack success rate and the post-attack motion quality through qualitative and quantitative analyses. The success of our quality-preserving attack application and distribution-based method raises serious concerns about the robustness of action recognizers, highlighting the need for further enhancements in this domain.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布的对抗攻击方法，在不引入噪声类扰动的前提下生成高质量对抗样本，并设计了一种与人类感知对齐的新评估指标，揭示了现有骨架动作识别系统在对抗鲁棒性方面的严重缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有针对骨架人体动作识别的对抗攻击方法通常引入噪声类扰动，导致攻击后动作质量显著下降，容易被先进识别系统察觉。作者发现这一问题源于攻击优化过程中经验风险与真实风险之间的差距，因此亟需一种既能保持动作质量又能实现高攻击成功率的对抗攻击方法。
AI.method: 本文提出一种基于分布的对抗攻击方法，通过最小化经验风险与真实风险之间的差距来保持动作质量，避免引入噪声类扰动。同时，作者提出了一种与人类感知对齐的新评估指标，用于真实地衡量攻击后动作的自然性。实验在两个数据集上对多个最先进的骨架动作识别模型进行了评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在攻击成功率和攻击后动作质量两方面均优于现有方法，定性和定量分析均验证了其有效性。该方法成功实现了质量保持的对抗攻击，凸显了当前动作识别系统鲁棒性的不足。
AI.conclusion: 本文的工作揭示了骨架动作识别系统在对抗环境下的脆弱性，表明即使在不破坏动作质量的前提下，攻击者仍能有效欺骗识别模型。这为该领域的鲁棒性增强研究提供了重要的警示和方向。

title: PRISMR: Overcoming Parse Collapse in Multimodal Listwise Ranking via Parameterized Representation Internalization
summary:
Generative listwise ranking with Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) aims to capture global list context in a single forward pass, but
  its effectiveness degrades in long-context multimodal scenarios. We identify a recurring failure mode, parse collapse, where the
  autoregressive decoder produces fluent yet incomplete rankings by silently omitting candidates and terminating early. This
  failure stems from limited context utilization rather than simple formatting mistakes, making prompt engineering and constrained
  decoding insufficient. We propose PRISMR (Parameterized Representation Internalization for Semantic Multimodal Ranking), a
  framework that replaces transient in-context list processing with parametric structural conditioning. PRISMR uses a lightweight
  hypernetwork to encode multimodal candidates in parallel and generate item-specific LoRA weights, which are synthesized into an
  instance-specific adapter for a LMM. This paradigm enables more robust internalization of list structure while preserving the
  base model. We further introduce a large-scale multimodal review-ranking benchmark for evaluation. Experiments demonstrate that
  PRISMR substantially reduces parse collapse, improves listwise ranking performance, and transfers effectively across domains and
  instruction-tuned backbones.

AI.tldr: 提出PRISMR框架，通过参数化结构条件替代上下文列表处理，利用轻量级超网络生成实例级LoRA权重以缓解多模态长序列排序中的解析崩塌问题，显著提升列表排序性能并支持跨领域迁移。
AI.motivation: 基于大型多模态模型（LMM）的生成式列表排序在长上下文场景下性能严重退化，其根源在于自回归解码器会出现"解析崩塌"——在生成流畅文本的同时静默跳过候选并提前终止，导致排序不完整；该问题源于有限的上下文利用率而非格式错误，使得提示工程和约束解码等传统手段难以奏效。
AI.method: PRISMR框架采用参数化结构条件替代瞬态上下文列表处理，具体包括：使用轻量级超网络并行编码多模态候选并生成每个项目特定的LoRA权重，再将这些权重合成为实例适配器注入LMM中，从而实现列表结构的鲁棒内化并保持基座模型不变。
AI.result: 实验表明，PRISMR大幅减少了解析崩塌现象，显著提升了列表排序性能，并且能够有效跨领域迁移以及在经过指令微调的骨干网络上泛化；此外，论文还构建了一个大规模多模态评论排序基准用于评估。
AI.conclusion: 解析崩塌是长上下文多模态排序中一个关键且被忽视的失败模式，PRISMR通过参数化结构内化机制从根本上缓解了该问题，为多模态列表排序提供了一种不依赖提示工程的鲁棒范式，并展示了良好的跨领域与跨骨干网络迁移能力。

title: Recursive Agent Harnesses
summary: Recursive language models (RLMs) showed that recursion over model calls is an effective strategy for long-context reasoning, and production coding agents have begun to write code that spawns subagents at scale, most recently in Anthropic's dynamic workflows. We name and study the pattern between these two lines of work, where the recursive unit is a full agent harness with filesystem tools, code execution, and planning rather than a model call with no tools. We call this the Recursive Agent Harness (RAH) and frame it as harness recursion, the code-first extension to the model recursion of RLMs. A parent agent generates and runs an executable script that spawns subagent harnesses in parallel for fine-grained workloads and uses structured function calls for small subtasks. We provide a controlled evaluation on long-context reasoning. With the backbone held fixed at GPT-5 to match the published Codex and RLM baselines, RAH improves the Codex coding-agent baseline from 71.75% to 81.36% on Oolong-Synthetic (199 samples, 13 context-length buckets up to 4M tokens), a gain attributable to the harness rather than the model. With a stronger backbone, Claude Sonnet 4.5, the same design reaches 89.77%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了递归代理框架（Recursive Agent Harness, RAH），将递归语言模型（RLM）中基于模型调用的递归思想扩展到代码优先的代理级递归，其中父代理生成并运行可执行脚本以并行生成子代理进行细粒度任务执行，在长上下文推理任务上显著超越既有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有递归语言模型（RLM）证明了递归式模型调用对长上下文推理的有效性，而生产级编码代理已开始大规模生成生成子代理的代码，但两者之间缺乏对代理级递归模式的系统性研究与命名。本文旨在识别、定义并系统评估这种以完整代理环境（含文件系统工具、代码执行和规划能力）而非仅模型调用为递归单元的模式。
AI.method: 提出的递归代理框架（RAH）采用代码优先的递归策略：父代理生成并运行可执行脚本，该脚本并行生成子代理以处理细粒度工作负载，并利用结构化函数调用处理小型子任务。这本质上是将RLM的模型递归扩展为代理级递归（harness recursion），其中递归单元是包含文件系统工具、代码执行和规划能力的完整代理环境。
AI.result: 在固定GPT-5为骨干模型、以已发表的Codex和RLM基线为对照的受控评估中，RAH在Oolong-Synthetic基准（199个样本、13个上下文长度区间、最长4M token）上将Codex编码代理基线从71.75%提升至81.36%，该增益源于代理框架而非模型本身。使用更强骨干Claude Sonnet 4.5时，同一设计达到89.77%。
AI.conclusion: 代理解释级递归（harness recursion）相比模型级递归能带来显著的长上下文推理性能提升，且增益可归因于代理框架设计本身而非底层模型能力的差异。该工作为递归代理架构的未来探索提供了明确的基准和形式化框架，有助于推进生产级动态工作流的设计。

title: A Multi-Modal Framework with Cross-Subject Pseudo-Labeling and Semantic Alignment for Micro-Gesture Recognition
summary: Micro-gestures (MGs) are spontaneous and subtle body movements that frequently convey hidden human emotions. Recognizing MGs in untrimmed videos remains highly challenging due to their extremely low signal-to-noise ratio, severe long-tailed class distribution, and the inherent domain shift encountered in cross-subject evaluation scenarios. In this paper, we propose a comprehensive multi-modal framework for Track 1 of the 4th MiGA-IJCAI Challenge. To capture fine-grained representations, we design a saliency-guided multi-modal extraction pipeline integrating 68-keypoint skeleton joint coordinates, 3D heatmap volumes, and high-resolution RGB visual features. We introduce a gentle square-root smoothed weighting mechanism paired with an Orthogonal Semantic Embedding Loss to protect tail classes without compromising overall recognition capabilities. More importantly, to bridge the cross-subject generalization gap, we propose a Cross-Modal Pseudo-Labeling (CMPL) strategy for unsupervised domain adaptation, which significantly boosts single-modal robustness. A temperature-scaled soft-voting mechanism is finally utilized to alleviate overconfidence during late fusion. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework achieves a competitive F1-score of 68.13\%, securing the 4th place.

AI.tldr: 本文针对微手势识别中信号微弱、长尾分布和跨主体域偏移等挑战，提出了一种结合显著性引导多模态提取、温和平方根平滑加权、正交语义嵌入损失和跨模态伪标签无监督域自适应的多模态框架，在第四届MiGA-IJCAI挑战赛Track 1中以68.13%的F1-score获得第四名。
AI.motivation: 微手势作为自发的细微身体动作常携带隐藏情绪信息，但未经裁剪视频中的微手势识别面临三大核心挑战：极低的信噪比导致信号难以捕捉、严重的长尾类别分布使得尾部类识别困难、跨主体评估场景中固有的域偏移问题导致模型泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出一个多模态框架，包含显著性引导的多模态提取流水线，整合68关键点骨架关节坐标、3D热图体积和高分辨率RGB视觉特征以捕获细粒度表征；引入温和平方根平滑加权机制结合正交语义嵌入损失以保护尾部类别且不损害整体识别能力；提出跨模态伪标签策略用于无监督域自适应以桥接跨主体泛化差距，最后采用温度缩放软投票机制缓解晚期融合中的过度自信问题。
AI.result: 在第四届MiGA-IJCAI挑战赛Track 1上，所提框架取得了具有竞争力的68.13% F1-score，最终排名第四，验证了各模块在微手势识别中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明结合多模态细粒度特征提取、类别平衡加权机制与跨模态无监督域自适应策略能够有效应对微手势识别的低信噪比、长尾分布和跨主体泛化三大核心难题，为复杂场景下的细微动作识别提供了可行的技术路径。

title: Learning What to Remember: A Cognitively Grounded Multi-Factor Value Model for Agentic Memory
summary: Long-running LLM agents accumulate interaction histories far larger than any context window, forcing a standing decision: what to encode deeply, what to forget, and what to retrieve under a fixed memory budget. Production systems answer with semantic similarity or recency -- both mis-specified for the forgetting decision, which is made at consolidation time before the future query is known. We propose a multi-factor memory value function V(m)=\sum_i w_i f_i(m) over seven interpretable factors (emotional intensity, goal relevance, value alignment, self/user relevance, task utility, reliability, and usage history) drawn from cognitive psychology, whose weights are learned from a downstream objective by a gradient-free optimiser, and whose single scalar uniformly controls encoding depth, forget risk, and retrieval rank. We make a methodological point: on LongMemEval, scoring goal relevance against the held-out evaluation question saturates gold-evidence retention at \approx 0.98 -- this measures retrieval, not forgetting. In the realistic blind regime, a learned multi-factor value retains 0.770 \pm 0.011 of gold evidence across 479 usable cases, versus 0.657 for uniform weights, 0.518 for the best single factor, and 0.368 for recency; every paired gap's 95% bootstrap CI is above zero, and a neural network over the same factors ties the linear model. The learned weights are interpretable -- reliability, emotional intensity, and self/user relevance dominate, while query-time goal similarity is correctly down-weighted for the forgetting decision. A controlled synthetic task with planted confounds confirms the learner recovers a separating weighting (1.00 retention) where uniform weighting fails (0.62). The substrate is open-source; all experiments run on a single CPU with no API calls.

AI.tldr: 提出一种多因子记忆价值函数V(m)=∑w_i f_i(m)，通过七个可解释因子（情绪强度、目标相关性、价值对齐、自我/用户相关性、任务效用、可靠性和使用历史）的加权组合来统一控制LLM智能体的编码深度、遗忘风险和检索排序，权重通过无梯度优化器从下游目标中学习，在盲遗忘设定下显著优于基于语义相似度或新近度的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 长期运行的LLM智能体产生的交互历史远超任何上下文窗口，需要决定哪些信息深度编码、哪些遗忘、哪些在固定记忆预算下检索。现有生产系统依赖语义相似度或新近度来做出遗忘决策，但遗忘决策在合并时（consolidation time）就已做出，而未来查询未知，因此这两种策略都是错误指定的。
AI.method: 提出了一个多因子记忆价值函数V(m)=∑w_i f_i(m)，包含七个来自认知心理学的可解释因子（情绪强度、目标相关性、价值对齐、自我/用户相关性、任务效用、可靠性和使用历史），权重通过无梯度优化器（gradient-free optimiser）从下游目标中学习，该函数输出的单一标量统一控制编码深度、遗忘风险和检索排名。在LongMemEval上进行了盲遗忘（blind regime）评估，并与均匀权重、单因子最优、新近度等基线对比。
AI.result: 在LongMemEval的盲遗忘设定下（479个可用案例），学习的多因子价值函数保留0.770±0.011的金标准证据，而均匀权重为0.657，最优单因子为0.518，新近度为0.368；所有配对差距的95%自助法置信区间均大于零，且使用相同因子的神经网络与线性模型性能相当。学习到的权重具有可解释性：可靠性、情绪强度和自我/用户相关性占主导，而查询时的目标相似度被正确降权。在含人为混淆的受控合成任务中，学习器恢复了区分性权重（1.00保留率），而均匀权重仅0.62。
AI.conclusion: 论文做出了一个方法论上的关键观点：在LongMemEval上使用与留出评估问题直接匹配的目标相关性评分来评估，会将金标准证据保留率饱和在约0.98——这实际上测量的是检索能力而非遗忘能力。实验结果表明，多因子学习的线性模型在遗忘决策上显著优于现有方法，且权重可解释，整个框架仅依赖单CPU运行，无需API调用，开源可复现。

title: HyperTool: Beyond Step-Wise Tool Calls for Tool-Augmented Agents
summary: Tool-augmented LLM agents commonly rely on step-wise atomic tool calls, where each invocation, observation, and value transfer is exposed in the main reasoning trace. This creates an \emph{execution-granularity mismatch}: locally deterministic tool workflows are unfolded into repeated model-visible decisions, consuming context and forcing the model to manage low-level dataflow in the trace. We introduce \textbf{HyperTool}, a unified executable MCP-style tool interface that changes the model-visible unit of tool execution. A model invokes HyperTool with a code block that can call existing tools through their original schemas, manipulate returned values, and pass intermediate results locally, folding deterministic tool subroutines into a single outer call. To train models to use this interface, we synthesize HyperTool-format trajectories from cross-tool compositional tasks and verify them in real MCP environments. On MCP-Universe, HyperTool improves average accuracy from 15.69\% to 35.29\% on Qwen3-32B and from 9.93\% to 33.33\% on Qwen3-8B, and surpass GPT-OSS and Kimi-k2.5 on average accuracy, showing that our HyperTool can substantially improve multi-step tool use.

AI.tldr: HyperTool 提出一种可执行的 MCP 风格工具接口，将原子化工具调用折叠为单一代码块调用，解决了工具执行粒度不匹配问题，在 MCP-Universe 上将 Qwen3-32B 的准确率从 15.69% 提升至 35.29%。
AI.motivation: 现有工具增强型 LLM 智能体采用逐步骤原子化工具调用方式，每次调用、观测和值传递都暴露在主推理轨迹中，导致执行粒度不匹配：局部确定性的工具工作流被拆解为多次模型可见决策，浪费上下文并迫使模型在轨迹中管理底层数据流。
AI.method: HyperTool 提出一种统一的、可执行的 MCP 风格工具接口，模型通过一个代码块调用 HyperTool，该代码块可调用已有工具、操作返回值并在本地传递中间结果，将确定性工具子例程折叠为单一外部调用。为训练模型使用此接口，作者从跨工具组合任务中合成 HyperTool 格式的轨迹，并在真实 MCP 环境中进行验证。
AI.result: 在 MCP-Universe 基准上，HyperTool 将 Qwen3-32B 的平均准确率从 15.69% 提升至 35.29%，将 Qwen3-8B 从 9.93% 提升至 33.33%，并在平均准确率上超过 GPT-OSS 和 Kimi-k2.5，显著改进了多步工具使用性能。
AI.conclusion: HyperTool 证明通过改变工具执行的模型可见单元，将确定性子过程折叠为单次调用，可大幅提升多步工具组合任务的效率与准确性，为工具增强型 LLM 智能体的接口设计提供了新方向。

title: TetherCache: Stabilizing Autoregressive Long-Form Video Generation with Gated Recall and Trusted Alignment
summary: Autoregressive video diffusion models provide a natural formulation for streaming and variable-length video generation by conditioning newly generated frames on previously generated content. However, extending these models to minute-level generation remains challenging: the limited KV-cache budget prevents the model from retaining the full history, while repeatedly conditioning on self-generated frames induces a context distribution shift that accumulates over time, leading to visual artifacts, quality degradation, and temporal drift. In this paper, we propose TetherCache, a training-free and plug-and-play cache management strategy for drift-resistant long video generation. TetherCache organizes the cache into sink, memory, and recent regions, and introduces two complementary mechanisms. First, GRAB (Gated Recall with Attention-Diversity Balancing) selects long-range memory frames using a gated score that combines attention-based relevance with temporal diversity, preserving informative yet diverse historical context under a fixed cache budget. Second, TAME (Trusted Alignment via Memory Editing) lightly edits newly recalled memory tokens by aligning their statistics to a trusted context distribution, reducing the pollution caused by drifted historical features. Built on Self-Forcing, TetherCache consistently improves long-video generation quality on VBench-Long across 30s, 60s, and 240s settings. In particular, for 240s generation, it substantially improves overall and semantic scores while reducing quality drift from 7.84 to 1.33, demonstrating its effectiveness for stable long-horizon autoregressive video diffusion.

AI.tldr: TetherCache 是一种无需训练、即插即用的缓存管理策略，通过门控召回与记忆对齐机制，有效缓解自回归视频扩散模型在超长视频生成中的上下文分布漂移和视觉退化问题，在240秒生成任务中将质量漂移从7.84降至1.33。
AI.motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型通过条件化已生成帧来实现流式与可变长度视频生成，但在扩展到分钟级生成时面临两大挑战：有限的KV缓存预算使模型无法保留完整历史信息，而反复基于自生成帧进行条件化会累积上下文分布漂移，导致视觉伪影、质量退化及时间漂移。
AI.method: TetherCache 将缓存组织为sink、memory和recent三个区域，并提出两种互补机制：GRAB（门控召回与注意力多样性平衡）通过结合注意力相关性和时间多样性的门控分数，在固定缓存预算下选择信息丰富且多样化的远程记忆帧；TAME（基于记忆编辑的可信对齐）通过将新召回的记忆token的统计量对齐到可信上下文分布，减少漂移历史特征造成的污染。
AI.result: 基于Self-Forcing框架，TetherCache在VBench-Long基准上持续提升30秒、60秒和240秒设置下的长视频生成质量。在240秒生成任务中，TetherCache显著提高了整体评分和语义评分，同时将质量漂移从7.84降至1.33，证明了其在稳定长程自回归视频扩散中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TetherCache通过训练无关的缓存管理与记忆对齐策略，有效解决了自回归视频扩散模型在长视频生成中的上下文分布漂移问题，为稳定、高质量的超长视频生成提供了一种即插即用的实用解决方案。

title: OpenMedQ: Broad Open Pretraining for Medical Vision-Language Models
comment: Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) 2026, Short Paper Track
summary: We present OpenMedQ, a medical vision-language model pretrained on the broadest fully-open medical mix to date: 14 datasets totaling ~3.35M pretraining samples spanning pathology, radiology, microscopy, and text-only clinical QA. OpenMedQ reaches state-of-the-art BLEU-1 on PathVQA (75.9), beating Med-PaLM M variants up to 562B parameters (~80x larger), and matches the best reported VQA-MED BLEU-1 (64.5). Its vision encoder, transferred to 8 unseen medical classification benchmarks under an identical downstream recipe, obtains the highest average macro-F1 (0.757) among BiomedCLIP (0.745), PMC-CLIP (0.745), PubMedCLIP (0.746), and a from-scratch baseline (0.616). We release our code and an interactive demo is publicly available as a reproducible baseline for the community.

AI.tldr: OpenMedQ 是一个基于 14 个公开医学数据集（约 335 万样本）预训练的医学视觉-语言模型，在 PathVQA 上以仅 562B 参数规模 1/80 的模型量达到 SOTA BLEU-1（75.9），并且在 8 个未见医学分类任务上以最高平均 macro-F1（0.757）超越现有开源医学 CLIP 模型，为社区提供了完全开放的可复现基线。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉-语言模型（如 Med-PaLM M）虽性能强大但模型规模巨大（高达 562B 参数），且部分模型并非完全开放，限制了社区的可复现性和广泛适用性；此外，缺乏在统一、广泛且公开的医学多模态数据上进行预训练的强基线模型。
AI.method: OpenMedQ 使用 14 个公开数据集的约 335 万预训练样本（涵盖病理学、放射学、显微图像和纯文本临床问答）进行视觉-语言预训练；其视觉编码器随后被迁移到 8 个未见过的医学分类基准上，在完全相同的下游微调方案下评估性能。
AI.result: 在 PathVQA 上达到 SOTA BLEU-1 75.9，超越参数规模大 80 倍的 Med-PaLM M 变体；在 VQA-MED 上取得与最佳报告持平的 BLEU-1 64.5；在 8 个未见医学分类任务上，视觉编码器的平均 macro-F1 为 0.757，优于 BiomedCLIP（0.745）、PMC-CLIP（0.745）、PubMedCLIP（0.746）和从头训练基线（0.616）。
AI.conclusion: OpenMedQ 证明了在广泛且完全公开的医学多模态数据上进行预训练可以显著降低模型规模的同时达到或超越超大模型的性能，为医学视觉-语言模型研究提供了一个可复现的强基线，并推动社区向开放科学方向发展。

title: EvoArena: Tracking Memory Evolution for Robust LLM Agents in Dynamic Environments
summary: Large language model (LLM) agents have achieved strong performance on a wide range of benchmarks, yet most evaluations assume static environments. In contrast, real-world deployment is inherently dynamic, requiring agents to continually align their knowledge, skills, and behavior with changing environments and updated task conditions. To address this gap, we introduce EvoArena, a benchmark suite that models environment changes as sequences of progressive updates across terminal, software, and social domains. We further propose EvoMem, a patch-based memory paradigm that records memory evolution as structured update histories, enabling agents to reason about environmental evolution through changes in their memory. Experiments show that current agents struggle on EvoArena, achieving an average accuracy of 39.6% across evolving terminal, software, and social-preference domains. EvoMem consistently improves performance, yielding an average gain of 1.5% on EvoArena and also improving standard benchmarks such as GAIA and LoCoMo by 6.1% and 4.8%. Beyond individual tasks, EvoMem further improves chain-level accuracy by 3.7% on EvoArena, where success requires completing a consecutive sequence of related evolutionary subtasks. Mechanistic analysis shows that EvoMem improves evidence capture in the memory, indicating better preservation of complete evolving environment states. Our results highlight the importance of modeling evolution in both evaluation and memory for reliable agent deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出EvoArena基准套件和EvoMem补丁式记忆范式，用于评估和提升LLM智能体在动态环境中的适应能力。实验表明现有智能体在演化环境下表现不佳（平均39.6%），而EvoMem能持续提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体评估大多基于静态环境，而真实部署场景本质上是动态的，智能体需要持续适应环境变化和任务条件更新，但缺乏针对演化环境的评估基准和相应的记忆机制。
AI.method: 构建EvoArena基准套件，将环境变化建模为终端、软件和社交三个领域的渐进式更新序列；提出EvoMem补丁式记忆范式，将记忆演化记录为结构化的更新历史，使智能体能够通过记忆变化推理环境演化。
AI.result: 现有智能体在EvoArena上平均准确率仅39.6%；EvoMem在EvoArena上平均提升1.5%，在GAIA和LoCoMo上分别提升6.1%和4.8%，在演化子任务链上提升3.7%的链级准确率。机制分析表明EvoMem改善了记忆中的证据捕获能力。
AI.conclusion: 在评估和记忆两个层面显式建模环境演化对于实现可靠的智能体部署至关重要，补丁式记忆范式能够有效帮助智能体推理环境变化并提升任务表现。

title: SeamEdit: A Black-Box VLM-Agnostic Pipeline for Large-Image Semantic Editing
summary: Semantic region editing for large images must satisfy two requirements at the same time: high generative quality and natural integration with surrounding content. Some related methods rely on white-box models and leave the strong generation capability of closed-source models underexplored. Directly applying closed-source models to tiled editing, however, introduces several failure modes: semantic deformation, canvas-level alignment drift, and visible seam artifacts. This paper presents SeamEdit, a training-free and model-agnostic pipeline that treats any VLM with inpainting capability as a black-box oracle. SeamEdit mitigates these issues through a five-stage post-hoc pipeline: overlay-based tile decomposition, black-box VLM inpainting, geometric and color-consistency correction, seam-risk-based multi-candidate ranking, and dynamic-programming curved seam fusion. The pipeline reduces seam visibility and supports semantic modification of arbitrary tile regions.

AI.tldr: SeamEdit 是一个无需训练、模型无关的五阶段后处理流水线，通过将任意具有修补能力的视觉语言模型作为黑盒预言机，解决了大图像语义区域编辑中的语义形变、画布对齐偏移和可见接缝伪影问题。
AI.motivation: 大图像的语义区域编辑需要同时满足高质量生成与自然融入周围内容，但现有方法多依赖白盒模型，未充分利用闭源模型的强生成能力；而直接将闭源模型应用于分块编辑会导致语义形变、画布对齐偏移和可见接缝伪影等故障模式。
AI.method: SeamEdit 提出一个无需训练、模型无关的五阶段后处理流水线：基于覆盖的分块分解、黑盒视觉语言模型修补、几何与色彩一致性校正、基于接缝风险的多候选排序、以及动态规划曲线接缝融合，旨在减少接缝可见性并支持任意分块区域的语义修改。
AI.result: 该流水线有效降低了接缝可见性，支持对任意分块区域进行语义修改，同时保持了高生成质量与自然的内容融合。
AI.conclusion: SeamEdit 提供了一种无需训练且模型无关的方案，成功将闭源视觉语言模型的强生成能力引入大图像语义编辑任务，为黑盒模型在分块编辑中的应用提供了有效路径。

title: Multi-Modal Agents for Power Distribution Defect Detection: An Evaluation of Foundation Models
summary: The power distribution network is critical to reliable electricity delivery, yet traditional inspection methods face limitations in semantic understanding, generalization, and closed-loop automation. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a Multi-Modal Agent framework specifically for power distribution defect detection. Central to this study is the systematic evaluation of multimodal foundation models as unified cognitive engines. We rigorously assess their integrated performance across three critical capabilities: (1) Perception, where the model must accurately identify equipment and generate expert-level descriptions of defects; (2) Reasoning, where the model interprets visual findings to diagnose causes, assess severity, and plan maintenance strategies based on domain knowledge; and (3) Tool Usage, where the model acts as an autonomous operator to execute actions -- such as querying knowledge bases or generating work orders -- to achieve closed-loop maintenance. To support this evaluation, a domain-specific evaluation dataset and a comprehensive benchmark are developed. Experimental results demonstrate the strengths and limitations of current foundation models in these three dimensions, providing empirical evidence for deploying autonomous agents in high-stakes industrial environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种面向配电网缺陷检测的多模态智能体框架，系统评估了多模态基础模型在感知、推理和工具使用三个关键能力上的综合表现，并构建了专用评估数据集和基准，揭示了现有模型在工业高风险场景中的优势与局限。
AI.motivation: 传统配电网巡检方法在语义理解、泛化能力和闭环自动化方面存在明显不足，难以满足高可靠电力输送对智能缺陷检测的严苛需求，亟需一种能够融合多模态信息并实现自主决策与操作的智能框架。
AI.method: 提出了一种多模态智能体框架，将多模态基础模型作为统一认知引擎，系统评估其在三个关键维度的集成性能：感知（识别设备并生成专家级缺陷描述）、推理（基于领域知识诊断原因、评估严重性并规划维护策略）、工具使用（自主执行知识库查询、生成工单等操作以实现闭环维护），同时构建了领域专用评估数据集和综合基准。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，当前多模态基础模型在感知、推理和工具使用三个维度上展现出各自的优势与不足，基于专用评估数据集和基准的量化评测为自主智能体在高风险工业环境中的部署提供了实证依据。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过系统性的多维度评估揭示了现有基础模型在工业缺陷检测场景下的能力边界，为未来在电力等高可靠性需求领域中部署自主智能体提供了经验证据和评估范式。

title: Unified MRI Brain Image Translation via Hierarchical Tumor Structure Comparison
summary:
Multi-modal MRI brain image translation via available modalities holds significant practical importance in modern medicine, providing robust support for early diagnosis, treatment planning, and outcome assessment of diseases. For this purpose, it is important to ensure the fidelity of the tumor regions after translation. However, existing brain image translation methods ignore the structure information of different tumor regions, which could assist translation models in enhancing the quality and clinical applicability of the translated images.
  In this work, we propose a novel translation model called HTSCGAN, which is a unified multi-modal brain image translation generative adversarial model integrating the structural information within tumor regions with the aim of improving the quality of brain image translation. Specifically, the generator employs three Patch Contrast Module (PCM) with different patch sizes to capture the hierarchical structural information of the tumor regions. In addition, a pretrained Patch Classifier (PC) and a pretrained Structure-Aware Encoder (SAE) are employed to derive the generated image containing the same tumor region structure as the ground truth image via patch classification loss and tumor perceptual loss, respectively. The experiments on BraTS2020 and BraTS2021 demonstrate strong performance of our model in both translation tasks and down stream segmentation tasks, highlighting its effectiveness in enhancing the quality and clinical relevance of the translated brain images. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/HTSCGAN.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HTSCGAN，一种融合肿瘤区域层次结构信息的统一多模态脑图像翻译生成对抗模型，通过三种尺度的Patch对比模块、预训练补丁分类器和结构感知编码器来保持肿瘤区域的结构保真度，在BraTS2020和BraTS2021上展现了优秀的翻译及下游分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有脑图像翻译方法在生成过程中忽略了不同肿瘤区域的结构信息，导致翻译后图像中肿瘤区域的保真度不足，难以满足临床对早期诊断、治疗方案规划和结果评估中对肿瘤结构完整性的严格要求。
AI.method: 提出HTSCGAN模型，生成器集成三种不同尺度的Patch对比模块（PCM）以捕获肿瘤区域的层次结构信息；同时引入预训练的Patch Classifier（PC）通过补丁分类损失、以及预训练的Structure-Aware Encoder（SAE）通过肿瘤感知损失，共同约束生成图像与真实图像在肿瘤区域结构上保持一致。
AI.result: 在BraTS2020和BraTS2021数据集上的实验表明，所提模型在翻译任务和下游分割任务中均表现出强劲性能，验证了其有效提升翻译后脑图像质量及临床相关性的能力。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了显式建模肿瘤区域层次结构信息对于提升多模态脑图像翻译质量及临床应用价值的关键作用，为后续将结构感知先验融入医学图像生成任务提供了可行范式。

title: The Illusion of Multi-Agent Advantage
summary: Prevailing wisdom posits that Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) are superior to Single-Agent Systems (SAS), citing advantages like context protection, parallel processing and distributed decision-making. However, empirical support for this claim relies primarily on comparisons with SAS baselines using benchmarks that prioritize isolated reasoning tasks, which do not adequately assess these advantages. Focusing on automatically generated MAS that are designed for enhanced generalizability over manually-designed counterparts, we perform a rigorous, systematic evaluation against SAS, specifically Chain-of-Thought with Self-Consistency (CoT-SC). Across traditional reasoning datasets and tasks with interactive multi-step workflows (e.g., BrowseComp-Plus), we demonstrate that automatic MAS consistently underperform CoT-SC despite being up to 10x more expensive. To isolate these failures from limitations inherent to task structure, we introduce a diagnostic synthetic dataset tailored for MAS featuring explicit task decomposition, context separation and parallelization potential. We show that expert-architected MAS consistently outperforms automatically generated architectures in both raw performance and cost-efficiency on this dataset, demonstrating that existing evaluation frameworks mask critical architectural gaps and inefficiencies of complex MAS by failing to account for the marginal utility of increased computational cost. Critically, systematic deconstruction of the generated MAS architectures reveals that current automated design paradigms produce architectural bloat that prioritizes superficial complexity which does not translate into functional utility, exposing a fundamental misalignment with multi-agent principles.

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统对比自动生成的多智能体系统（MAS）与单智能体系统（SAS）中的Chain-of-Thought with Self-Consistency（CoT-SC），发现自动MAS在传统推理和交互式多步任务中均持续落后于CoT-SC，即便成本高出10倍；进一步引入诊断性合成数据集揭示了现有评估框架掩盖了MAS的架构缺陷与低效问题，当前自动设计范式产生的架构臃肿与功能效用严重脱节。
AI.motivation: 现有研究普遍认为多智能体系统（MAS）优于单智能体系统（SAS），但这一论断主要基于在偏向孤立推理任务的基准上与SAS基线进行的比较，未能充分评估MAS在上下文保护、并行处理和分布式决策等方面的理论优势；同时，自动生成的MAS虽声称具有更好的泛化性，但其真实性能缺乏系统的严格评估。
AI.method: 作者对自动生成的多智能体系统（MAS）与单智能体系统（SAS）中的Chain-of-Thought with Self-Consistency（CoT-SC）进行了严格的系统评估，涵盖传统推理数据集和交互式多步工作流任务（如BrowseComp-Plus）；为隔离任务结构带来的局限性，作者还构建了一个专门针对MAS的合成诊断数据集，该数据集具有显式任务分解、上下文分离和并行化潜力，并在其上对比了专家设计的MAS与自动生成的MAS。
AI.result: 在传统推理和交互式多步任务中，自动生成的MAS持续不如CoT-SC，尽管成本高出10倍；在专为MAS设计的诊断数据集上，专家设计的MAS在原始性能和成本效率两方面均一致优于自动生成的MAS；进一步系统解构发现，当前自动设计范式产生的架构臃肿是表面复杂性的堆积，未能转化为实际功能效用。
AI.conclusion: 现有评估框架未能考虑计算成本增加的边际效用，从而掩盖了复杂MAS的关键架构缺陷和低效问题；当前自动MAS设计范式存在与多智能体基本原则的根本性错位，产生的架构复杂性与功能效用严重脱节，亟需重新审视MAS的自动生成与评估方法。

title: PP-OCRv6: From 1.5M to 34.5M Parameters, Surpassing Billion-Scale VLMs on OCR Tasks
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved impressive results on general vision-language tasks, yet they suffer from hallucination, imprecise localization, and prohibitive computational cost when applied to dedicated OCR scenarios. This paper presents PP-OCRv6, a lightweight OCR system that combines architectural innovation with data-centric optimization. PP-OCRv6 redesigns the backbone, detection neck, and recognition neck around a unified MetaFormer-style building block with structural reparameterization, decoupling spatial token mixing from channel mixing and supporting both tasks through task-specific stride configurations. Three model tiers (medium, small, tiny) share the same block primitives, covering deployment scenarios from server to edge. On our in-house benchmarks, PP-OCRv6_medium achieves 83.2% recognition accuracy and 86.2% detection Hmean, outperforming PP-OCRv5_server by +5.1% and +4.6% respectively while surpassing Qwen3-VL-235B, GPT-5.5, and Gemini-3.1-Pro with orders of magnitude fewer parameters. The tiny tier achieves 3.9$\times$ faster inference than PP-OCRv5_mobile on Intel Xeon CPU while maintaining comparable accuracy.

AI.tldr: PP-OCRv6 提出基于统一 MetaFormer 模块的轻量级 OCR 系统，通过结构重参数化与数据驱动优化，在中、小、微三档模型规模下，以较之前代服务器模型更少的参数量在识别精度和检测 Hmean 上分别提升 5.1% 和 4.6%，并超越多个超大 VLM 模型，同时在 CPU 上实现 3.9 倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLM 在通用视觉语言任务上表现出色，但在面向 OCR 的专用场景中面临幻觉、定位不精确和计算开销过大等突出问题，亟需一种轻量且高效的专业 OCR 系统以兼顾精度与部署效率。
AI.method: PP-OCRv6 围绕统一的 MetaFormer 风格构建块重新设计了骨干网络、检测颈部和识别颈部，采用结构重参数化将空间 token 混合与通道混合解耦，并通过任务特定的步长配置同时支持检测和识别任务，提供 medium、small、tiny 三种模型规模以覆盖从服务器到边缘的部署场景。
AI.result: 在内部基准上，PP-OCRv6_medium 达到 83.2% 的识别准确率和 86.2% 的检测 Hmean，相比 PP-OCRv5_server 分别提升 5.1% 和 4.6%，并以数个数量级更少的参数量超越 Qwen3-VL-235B、GPT-5.5 和 Gemini-3.1-Pro；tiny 模型在 Intel Xeon CPU 上的推理速度比 PP-OCRv5_mobile 快 3.9 倍，同时保持相近精度。
AI.conclusion: PP-OCRv6 表明，通过统一的 MetaFormer 架构设计、结构重参数化和任务感知的步长配置，可以在极轻量化的模型上实现显著优于超大视觉语言模型的 OCR 性能，为工业级 OCR 系统的轻量化和高效部署提供了有力方案。

title: Nous: An Attempt to Extract and Inject the Cognition Behind Prediction-Market Behavior
comment: 37 pages, 1 figure, 7 tables. Reproduction artifacts (code, frozen profiles, prompts, model outputs): https://github.com/WillChienT/nous-paper
summary: As LLM agents proliferate in prediction markets and collective decision-making, they risk a cognitive monoculture: agents built on shared foundation models produce correlated forecasts, and recent measurement finds frontier-model errors correlated at r ~ 0.77. We ask whether human cognitive diversity can be recovered from behavior and transferred to LLM agents. Nous extracts a structured eight-dimension behavioral profile from real Polymarket trading activity and injects it into agents through prompts. Our central finding is a dissociation between the two halves of that pipeline. Extraction works, partially: across 100 wallets, 8 of 14 parameters are temporally stable (split-half ICC >= 0.5, bootstrap CI lower bound > 0.3; contrarian score reaches ICC ~ 0.9); wallets are identifiable from their profiles well above chance (top-1 retrieval 17-22% vs. 1% chance); and two of four pre-specified dimensions rank-correlate with future realized profit out-of-sample, though the correlations do not survive behavioral-confound controls. Prompt-level injection does not measurably transmit it: on a semantic embedding metric, structured injection shows no significant advantage over a length-matched control on any model, and the diversity it induces neither reduces ensemble error correlation nor improves Brier score -- a null that persists across exploratory checks on sampling temperature, profile diversity, and question difficulty. Measuring the prompts themselves locates the compression before the model: the structure-to-narrative translator emits near-uniform prompts whose spread does not track profile spread. We position Nous as measuring the cognitive-monoculture problem and the limits of a prompt-level remedy, motivating deeper, below-the-prompt injection (fine-tuning, activation steering). Code, frozen profiles, prompts, and model outputs: https://github.com/WillChienT/nous-paper

AI.tldr: Nous通过从Polymarket交易行为中提取八维行为画像并注入LLM智能体提示词，发现行为提取部分可行（部分参数时间稳定、钱包可识别），但提示层注入无法有效传递认知多样性，无法降低集成误差相关性或提升Brier分数，表明提示级干预不足以解决LLM智能体的认知单一文化问题。
AI.motivation: 基于共享基础模型的LLM智能体在预测市场和集体决策中产生相关预测（前沿模型误差相关性r~0.77），导致认知单一文化问题，本文探究是否能从人类行为中恢复认知多样性并将其转移给LLM智能体。
AI.method: 提出Nous框架，从Polymarket真实交易活动中提取八维行为画像（含14个参数），通过提示词注入LLM智能体；采用裂半组内相关系数（ICC）评估参数时间稳定性、Top-1检索评估钱包可识别性、语义嵌入度量评估注入效果，并通过集成误差相关性和Brier分数评估多样性传输效果。
AI.result: 8/14个参数时间稳定（裂半ICC≥0.5，bootstrap下限>0.3，反向评分ICC~0.9）；钱包可识别性远高于随机（Top-1检索17-22% vs 1%）；结构化注入在语义嵌入度量上无显著优于长度匹配对照，且未降低集成误差相关性或改善Brier分数；结构到叙述的翻译器发出近均匀的提示词，其散布不跟踪画像散布。
AI.conclusion: 行为提取部分可行但提示层注入无法有效传输认知多样性，认知单一文化问题需要更深层的干预（微调、激活引导），提示级干预存在根本性局限。

title: Cascade Classification of Dermoscopic Images of Skin Neoplasms with Controllable Sensitivity and External Clinical Validation
summary:
Purpose. To compare deep learning architectures and classification schemes for dermoscopic images of skin neoplasms and assess their generalization on transfer from open international datasets to independent clinical datasets of Russian practice.
  Methods. Four architectures (ViT-B/16, Swin-S, ConvNeXt-S, EfficientNetV2-S) were compared in three schemes: binary (malignant/benign), single-stage four-class (benign, MEL, SCC, BCC), and a two-stage cascade (binary triage, then three-class differentiation MEL/SCC/BCC). All models used ImageNet-pretrained weights and a single augmentation protocol on aggregated open ISIC Archive data, and were evaluated on an internal held-out sample and two clinical datasets (Melanoscope AI mobile system; Sechenov University).
  Results. Internally the binary stage attains ROC-AUC 0.952-0.966; on Sechenov University it drops to 0.797-0.893, sensitivity to 0.53-0.67, and ECE rises from 0.02 to 0.27-0.39 with underestimation of malignancy, quantifying a generalization gap in ranking and calibration. Paired tests confirm one inter-architecture result on clinical data: the deficit of ViT-B/16 at the binary stage (p<0.05); at the differentiation stage no architecture has a proven advantage. The cascade raises macro F1 over single-stage four-class classification for most architectures, but significantly only for ViT-B/16, by recovering malignant lesions assigned to the dominant benign class. On ISIC MILK10k, direct 11-class classification yields mean-class sensitivity 0.525.
  Conclusion. A tunable triage threshold gives sensitivity control not attainable in standard single-stage (argmax) classification and better reproduces clinical differential-diagnosis logic. The persistent generalization gap mandates external clinical validation and recalibration before deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了四种深度学习架构（ViT-B/16、Swin-S、ConvNeXt-S、EfficientNetV2-S）在三种分类方案（二分类、单阶段四分类、两阶段级联）下对皮肤镜图像进行皮肤肿瘤分类的性能，并量化了从开放国际数据集迁移到俄罗斯临床独立数据集时存在的泛化差距，发现校准误差显著增大且恶性病变被低估，同时证明了两阶段级联方案在恢复恶性病变召回方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在开放数据集上表现优异，但其在临床实践中对独立数据集的泛化能力，特别是在排名准确性、校准性能以及不同分类方案（如二分类、多分类、级联分类）之间的系统性比较尚不充分，且缺乏从国际数据集到特定临床场景（如俄罗斯临床实践）的迁移评估。
AI.method: 研究比较了四种架构（ViT-B/16、Swin-S、ConvNeXt-S、EfficientNetV2-S）在三种分类方案下的表现：二分类（恶性/良性）、单阶段四分类（良性、MEL、SCC、BCC）以及两阶段级联（先二分类分流，再进行MEL/SCC/BCC三分类）。所有模型均使用ImageNet预训练权重和统一的增强方案，在聚合的ISIC Archive开放数据上训练，并在内部留存样本及两个独立临床数据集（Melanoscope AI移动系统、Sechenov大学数据集）上评估。
AI.result: 内部测试中二分类ROC-AUC达0.952-0.966；在Sechenov大学数据集上降至0.797-0.893，灵敏度降至0.53-0.67，期望校准误差（ECE）从0.02升至0.27-0.39，且模型低估恶性病变概率。配对检验确认了临床数据上ViT-B/16在二分类阶段的性能显著落后（p<0.05），而在鉴别阶段无架构具备显著优势。级联方案相比单阶段四分类提升了多数架构的宏F1，但对ViT-B/16的提升具有统计显著性，主要通过恢复被主导良性类别掩盖的恶性病变实现。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段级联方案通过可调的分流阈值实现了标准单阶段argmax分类无法达到的灵敏度控制，并更好地复现了临床鉴别诊断逻辑。研究揭示了从开放数据集到临床实践存在持久的泛化差距，强调在部署前必须进行外部临床验证和重校准。

title: Rethinking RAG in Long Videos: What to Retrieve and How to Use It?
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation is moving beyond text into long, egocentric video, where systems must select query-relevant chunks across multiple modalities and temporal granularities. Yet progress in VideoRAG is limited by two gaps: existing benchmarks allow queries to be answered without the video, obscuring retrieval errors, and prior methods apply a single modality-granularity configuration per query, ignoring chunk-level variability. We address both by introducing V-RAGBench, a benchmark of $\langle$query, evidence chunk, answer$\rangle$ triplets that enables faithful, decoupled evaluation of retrieval and generation, and CARVE, a simple method that runs parallel retrievers across configurations and employs chunk-adaptive reranking to identify the winning configuration for each chunk. Each chunk then enters the generator under its winning configuration selected during retrieval, yielding an interleaved evidence form where the chunk-level decision propagates across both stages. CARVE outperforms eight recent VideoRAG baselines, with the chunks supplied to the generator interleaving multiple configurations rather than sharing a single one, a behavior unattainable by query-level methods.

AI.tldr: 提出V-RAGBench基准和CARVE方法，解决视频检索增强生成中现有基准可绕过视频回答问题及查询级单配置忽视块级可变性的两大缺陷，CARVE通过并行检索器和块自适应重排序实现块级多配置交织，在多项基准上超越八种最新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有VideoRAG基准存在两个关键缺陷：一是允许仅凭文本即可回答问题，无需依赖视频内容，从而掩盖了检索环节的错误；二是先前方法对每个查询仅采用单一模态-粒度配置，忽视了不同视频块在模态和粒度需求上的可变性，导致检索与生成阶段的配置无法灵活适应块级差异。
AI.method: 提出V-RAGBench基准，由⟨查询, 证据块, 答案⟩三元组构成，支持检索与生成的忠实解耦评估；提出CARVE方法，通过并行运行多个不同模态-粒度配置的检索器，并采用块自适应重排序机制为每个视频块选择最优配置，随后各块以其获胜配置进入生成器，形成块级决策在检索与生成两阶段间传播的交错证据形式。
AI.result: CARVE在V-RAGBench基准上超越八种近期VideoRAG基线方法，其关键发现是生成器接收的块来自多个不同配置的交错组合，而非单一共享配置，这种块级多配置交织行为是查询级方法无法实现的，从而显著提升了检索与生成的整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究表明视频RAG中块级配置自适应相较于查询级固定配置具有显著优势，V-RAGBench为忠实评估视频检索与生成提供了可靠基准，而CARVE证明了并行多配置检索与块自适应重排序的有效性，为未来视频RAG研究提供了新的评估框架与方法范式。

title: Iterative Visual Thinking: Teaching Vision-Language Models Spatial Self-Correction through Visual Feedback
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) achieve strong singleshot spatial grounding, yet lack any mechanism to observe and correct their own predictions. We find that naively prompting a VLM to iterate over rendered visualizations of its predictions causes catastrophic failure: Acc@0.5 on referring expression comprehension collapses from 79.6% to 48.7% (a 31 percentage point drop), revealing a fundamental gap between grounding capability and self-correction ability. We propose Iterative Visual Thinking (IVT), a closed-loop framework in which the model predicts a bounding box, observes the prediction rendered on the image, and iteratively refines through visual feedback. A two-phase training recipe closes the self-correction gap: first, we exploit the base model's own predictions as realistic errors and prompt a teacher VLM to generate corrective reasoning traces, yielding supervised data without human annotation; second, we apply Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a simple IoU reward to stabilize multi-step refinement. On a mixed benchmark spanning RefCOCOg, Ref-Adv, and Ref-L4 (505 test samples), SFT warm-up with IVT surpasses the single-shot base model on every metric: Acc@0.5 rises to 82.0% (+2.4pp), Acc@0.7 to 74.1% (+3.2pp), and Acc@0.9 to 48.3% (+2.8pp). GRPO further reduces per-step IoU degradation by 5x, stabilizing the refinement trajectory. All training uses only 2,400 samples on a single GPU, demonstrating that spatial self-correction is a learnable capability that can be instilled at modest scale.

AI.tldr: 提出迭代视觉推理（IVT）框架，通过预测-观察-修正的闭环机制和两阶段训练（SFT数据蒸馏+GRPO强化学习），以极小成本（2400样本、单GPU）弥合了视觉语言模型空间定位中的自修正能力鸿沟，使Acc@0.5从79.6%提升至82.0%。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLM）在单次空间定位中表现强劲，但缺乏任何观测和修正自身预测的机制；直接对预测结果的可视化渲染进行迭代提示会导致灾难性失败（Acc@0.5从79.6%暴跌至48.7%），暴露出定位能力与自修正能力之间根本性的鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出迭代视觉推理（IVT）闭环框架：模型预测边界框、观测渲染在图像上的预测结果、通过视觉反馈迭代优化。两阶段训练策略：第一阶段利用基座模型自身预测作为真实错误，提示教师VLM生成修正推理轨迹以构建无需人工标注的监督数据；第二阶段应用分组相对策略优化（GRPO），以IoU为奖励信号稳定多步修正过程。
AI.result: 在包含RefCOCOg、Ref-Adv和Ref-L4的混合基准（505个测试样本）上，SFT预热后的IVT在所有指标上超越单次基座模型：Acc@0.5提升至82.0%（+2.4pp），Acc@0.7提升至74.1%（+3.2pp），Acc@0.9提升至48.3%（+2.8pp）。GRPO进一步将每一步的IoU退化降低了5倍，稳定了修正轨迹。全部训练仅使用2400个样本和单块GPU。
AI.conclusion: 空间定位的自修正能力是一种可学习的技能，能够以极小的数据规模和计算资源被注入VLM中；两阶段训练方案有效解决了直接迭代导致的性能坍塌问题，GRPO在维持多步修正稳定性方面发挥了关键作用。

title: TerraBench: Can Agents Reason Over Heterogeneous Earth-System Data?
summary: Climate and environmental decision-making increasingly requires reasoning across heterogeneous inputs, including gridded physical data, satellite imagery, geospatial context, and simulator outputs. Weather and climate foundation models can forecast well, but do not reason interactively in language, while large language models (LLMs) reason in language but cannot operate directly on high-dimensional Earth-system data. As a result, real scientific workflows in Earth-science remain underserved. We introduce TerraBench, a benchmark for grounded Earth-science reasoning, built on TerraAgent, a ReAct-style executable framework that interleaves reasoning, tool calls, and observations to couple LLM planning with scientific tools for environmental retrieval, geospatial processing, simulation, and artifact-backed computation. TerraBench unifies analysis of Earth observation imagery, gridded data, GIS reasoning and simulation in a single executable interface, whereas prior benchmarks isolate these capabilities into narrow individual tasks. It is also the first in this space to pair process-level tool-use metrics with tolerance-aware numeric scoring. The benchmark comprises 403 extensive agentic tasks across three tracks (Fundamentals, Simulator-Grounded, and Document-Grounded Verification) and eight application domains with 24,500 verified execution steps. These results indicate that reliable Earth-science agents must go beyond tool access to coordinate heterogeneous workflows, parameterize tools precisely, and preserve artifact provenance.

AI.tldr: TerraBench 是一个面向地球科学推理的基准测试，它通过 TerraAgent 框架将大语言模型的规划能力与科学工具耦合，实现了对地球观测影像、网格化数据、GIS 推理和模拟的统一可执行接口，包含 403 个智能体任务和 24,500 个已验证的执行步骤，并首次在此领域引入过程级工具使用度量和容差感知数值评分。
AI.motivation: 现有的气候与环境决策需要跨异构输入（网格化物理数据、卫星图像、地理空间上下文和模拟器输出）进行推理，但气象基础模型虽能预测却无法以语言形式交互推理，大语言模型虽能进行语言推理却无法直接处理高维地球系统数据，导致真实的地球科学工作流缺乏有效的统一解决方案。
AI.method: 论文提出了 TerraBench 基准测试，其核心是 TerraAgent——一个基于 ReAct 风格的可执行框架，通过交织推理、工具调用和观察结果，将大语言模型的规划能力与环境检索、地理空间处理、模拟以及基于人工制品的计算等科学工具相耦合，从而在单一可执行接口中统一了地球观测影像分析、网格化数据处理、GIS 推理和模拟。
AI.result: 该基准包含 403 个广泛的智能体任务，横跨三个轨道（基础、模拟接地和文档接地验证）和八个应用领域，总计 24,500 个已验证的执行步骤，并且是首个在此领域中引入过程级工具使用度量和容差感知数值评分的基准。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果表明，可靠的地球科学智能体不仅需要工具访问能力，还必须能够协调异构工作流、精确参数化工具并维护人工制品来源，这为未来地球科学自主推理系统的设计提供了重要指导。

title: Zero-Shot Captioning for Cultural Heritage: Automated Image Analysis of Traditional Indonesian Clothing
comment: accepted to ICME workshop on AIART 2026
summary: This paper presents Custom ZeroCLIP, a retrieval-augmented vision-language framework for zero-shot captioning of Indonesian traditional garments. The dataset contains 3,800 expert-annotated images from all 38 Indonesian provinces. Using a province-level inductive zero-shot protocol, the model is trained on 24 seen provinces, validated on 6 seen provinces, and evaluated on 8 unseen provinces. The framework combines a frozen CLIP ViT-B/32 image encoder, a CLIP text encoder, a BERT text encoder, and an LSTM caption decoder. During inference, unseen-province labels and captions are unavailable, and retrieval uses only captions from training provinces. No unseen-province image, label, or caption is used during training, validation, or retrieval-bank construction. Custom ZeroCLIP achieves a CLIPScore of 0.8536, BLEU-4 of 0.3342, and METEOR of 0.4859, outperforming existing baselines. Ablation results show that retrieval improves cultural vocabulary recovery with a 19.3\% METEOR gain, while human evaluation confirms stronger cultural accuracy and fluency. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of retrieval-augmented domain adaptation for culturally grounded caption generation in low-resource heritage settings. The dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/AnugrahAidinYotolembah/Traditional-Indonesian-Clothing-Captioning-Dataset.

AI.tldr: Custom ZeroCLIP 提出了一种基于检索增强的视觉-语言框架，结合冻结的 CLIP 图像编码器、双文本编码器和 LSTM 解码器，在零样本条件下为 8 个未见过的印尼省份生成传统服饰的说明文本，在 CLIPScore、BLEU-4 和 METEOR 上分别达到 0.8536、0.3342 和 0.4859，并实现 19.3% 的 METEOR 文化词汇恢复增益。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在低资源、文化特定场景（如印尼传统服饰）中缺乏领域适应性，且零样本条件下无法获取未见省份的标签与说明文本，导致模型难以生成文化上准确且流畅的说明文本。
AI.method: Custom ZeroCLIP 采用冻结的 CLIP ViT-B/32 图像编码器提取视觉特征，结合 CLIP 文本编码器与 BERT 文本编码器进行语义编码，并通过 LSTM 解码器生成说明文本。训练时使用 24 个可见省份的 3,800 张专家标注图像，验证使用 6 个可见省份，评估使用 8 个未见省份。推理时检索库仅包含训练省份的说明文本，不使用任何未见省份的图像、标签或说明文本。
AI.result: Custom ZeroCLIP 在未见省份上取得 CLIPScore 0.8536、BLEU-4 0.3342、METEOR 0.4859，优于所有基线模型。消融实验表明检索增强带来 19.3% 的 METEOR 增益，显著提升文化词汇恢复能力；人工评估进一步验证了模型在文化准确性和流畅性上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明检索增强的域自适应方法能有效应对低资源文化遗产场景下的零样本说明生成任务，为文化特定视觉-语言任务提供了一种可行的范式，并公开了数据集以推动后续研究。

title: Reasoning for Mobile User Experience with Multimodal LLMs: Task, Benchmark, and Approach
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, Accepted at CVPR 2026 Findings
summary:
User experience (UX) centered on usability, perceived consistency, and functional clarity is fundamental to real-world user interfaces (UI). The application of
  multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in the field of user interfaces is evolving rapidly, such as visual element grounding, graphical user interface (GUI)
  agents, and design-to-code generation. However, research efforts on evaluating UX based on UI screenshots are still immature. To address this, we propose UXBench,
  a novel multimodal benchmark consisting of 2,000 VQA data samples designed to assess MLLMs' ability to perform UI-based reasoning. UXBench includes 8 tasks based
  on real-world UI screenshots that require fine-grained diagnosis of UX issues across layout relationships, visual hierarchy, and content consistency. Our
  extensive evaluation of mainstream MLLMs shows that they remain fundamentally limited in their capacity for UI-based reasoning. The results underscore the need
  for further advancements in this area. To bridge this gap, we propose UI-UX, an MLLM based on Qwen3-VL-4B-Thinking foundation model and enhanced via reinforcement
  learning with two key innovations: a reward routing mechanism that dynamically balances perceptual understanding and logical reasoning during inference, and an
  asymmetric transition reward that suppresses redundant or insufficient reasoning steps. Experiments demonstrate that UI-UX achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA)
  performance on UXBench, attaining an accuracy of 0.7963 -- surpassing Claude-4.5-Sonnet's 0.6550 -- while exhibiting strong generalization across diverse UI tasks
  and maintaining low inference latency.

AI.tldr: 提出UXBench基准（2000个VQA样本，8项UI推理任务）评估MLLM的用户体验推理能力，并构建UI-UX模型（基于Qwen3-VL-4B-Thinking，结合奖励路由机制与非对称过渡奖励的强化学习），在UXBench上达到0.7963准确率，超越Claude-4.5-Sonnet（0.6550）。
AI.motivation: 现有MLLM在GUI视觉元素定位、设计生成等方面进展迅速，但基于UI截图评估用户体验（可用性、感知一致性、功能清晰度）的研究尚不成熟，缺乏针对UI细粒度推理能力的系统化评测基准。
AI.method: 构建UXBench基准（2000个VQA样本，涵盖布局关系、视觉层次、内容一致性8项任务）；提出UI-UX模型，以Qwen3-VL-4B-Thinking为基础，通过强化学习增强，核心创新包括奖励路由机制（动态平衡感知理解与逻辑推理）和非对称过渡奖励（抑制冗余或不足推理步骤）。
AI.result: 主流MLLM在UXBench上表现有限，UI-UX达到0.7963准确率，显著超越Claude-4.5-Sonnet的0.6550，在多样化UI任务上展现强泛化能力且保持低推理延迟。
AI.conclusion: 当前MLLM在UI推理能力上存在根本性局限，UI-UX通过动态推理平衡与步骤优化机制显著提升了性能，表明该方向仍需进一步发展，为未来UI用户体验自动化评估提供了新基准与方法框架。

title: Cross-Modal Masked Compositional Concept Modeling for Enhancing Visio-Linguistic Compositionality
comment: Accepted to ACL 2026 Main Conference, 25 pages
summary: Contrastively trained vision-language models like CLIP, have made remarkable progress in learning joint image-text representations, but still face challenges in compositional understanding. They often exhibit a "bag-of-words" behavior--struggling to capture the object relations, attribute-object bindings, and word order dependencies. This limitation arises not only from the reliance on global, single-vector representations for optimization, but also from the insufficient exploitation and modeling of the rich compositional information inherently present in paired image text data. In this work, we propose MACCO (MAsked Compositional Concept MOdeling), a framework that masks compositional concepts in one modality and reconstructs them conditioned on the full contextual information from the other, enabling the model to capture and align cross-modal compositional structures more effectively. To facilitate this process, we introduce two auxiliary objectives that jointly align and regularize masked features both inter-modally and intra-modally. Extensive experiments on five compositional benchmarks, along with in-depth analyses, demonstrate that our approach not only significantly enhances compositionality in VLMs but also improves their ability to capture syntactic structure and linguistic information. Additionally, the improved compositionality also benefits text-to-image generation and multimodal large language model. Code is available at https://github.com/hiker-lw/MACCO.

AI.tldr: 提出MACCO框架，通过跨模态掩码重建和辅助对齐正则化目标，显著提升视觉-语言模型在组合性理解、句法结构捕获以及下游生成任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 对比训练的视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）在组合性理解上存在显著不足，表现为"词袋"行为——难以捕捉对象关系、属性-对象绑定以及词序依赖，原因既包括全局单向量表示的限制，也包括对图文数据中丰富组合信息的利用不充分。
AI.method: 提出MACCO框架，在一种模态中掩码组合概念，并利用另一模态的完整上下文信息进行重建，从而有效捕获和对齐跨模态组合结构；同时引入两个辅助目标，在模态间和模态内联合对齐与正则化掩码特征。
AI.result: 在五个组合性基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法显著增强了视觉-语言模型的组合性理解能力，并提升了模型对句法结构和语言信息的捕获能力；改进的组合性还能有效迁移到文本到图像生成和多模态大语言模型任务中。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨模态掩码重建与多层级对齐正则化，MACCO有效解决了视觉-语言模型组合性理解不足的问题，并验证了组合性增强对下游多模态任务的正向迁移效果，为提升VLM的结构化理解能力提供了可行路径。

title: ARMOR-MAD: Adaptive Routing for Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Debate in Large Language Model Reasoning
summary: Multi-agent debate (MAD) can improve large language model reasoning, but fixed debate pipelines often waste computation and can amplify correlated errors among similar agents. We propose ARMOR-MAD, a training-free heterogeneous MAD framework that treats debate as conditional computation. ARMOR-MAD combines three components: Pre-debate Agreement Routing (PAR) decides whether independently generated Round-0 answers require debate; Early Agreement Stopping Evaluator (EASE) stops debate after convergence; and Semantic Outlier Detection (SOD) down-weights abnormal final answers during aggregation. Across MATH Level 5, GSM8K, MMLU, and MMLU-Pro, ARMOR-MAD consistently improves over fixed-round heterogeneous debate with the same model pool, reaching 65.5\%, 96.5\%, 90.0\%, and 81.5\% accuracy, respectively. The results suggest that genuine model heterogeneity and agreement-based control are both important for making MAD more accurate and efficient.

AI.tldr: ARMOR-MAD 提出了一种无需额外训练、基于条件计算的异构多智能体辩论框架，通过辩论前路由、早期停止评估和语义异常检测三个组件，在多个推理基准上显著提升了准确率与计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的多智能体辩论方法采用固定管道，不仅浪费计算资源，还可能在相似智能体之间放大相关错误，缺乏根据辩论进程动态调整计算量的机制。
AI.method: ARMOR-MAD 是一个无需训练的异构多智能体辩论框架，将辩论视为条件计算问题，包含三个核心组件：Pre-debate Agreement Routing (PAR) 决定是否需要辩论；Early Agreement Stopping Evaluator (EASE) 在达成一致后提前终止辩论；Semantic Outlier Detection (SOD) 在聚合时降低异常最终答案的权重。
AI.result: 在 MATH Level 5、GSM8K、MMLU 和 MMLU-Pro 四个基准上，ARMOR-MAD 相较于固定轮次异构辩论一致取得提升，分别达到 65.5%、96.5%、90.0% 和 81.5% 的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，真正的模型异构性和基于一致性的控制机制对于提高多智能体辩论的准确性和效率都至关重要。

title: Edit the Bits, Diff the Codes: Bitwise Residual Editing for Visual Autoregressive Models
summary: Text-guided image editing with visual autoregressive (VAR) generators requires controlling both what the model samples and where the sampled change is written back into the image code. Existing VAR editors mainly operate on token streams, features, or flat next-token logits, leaving two native structures of bitwise-residual VAR models underused: the per-bit Bernoulli prediction head and the additive multi-scale residual code field from which the image is assembled. We propose BitResEdit, a training-free editor for bitwise-residual VAR generators such as Infinity. BitEdit performs source-negative guidance by tilting the post-CFG per-bit log-odds along a source--target contrast computed on a shared edited prefix, then projects each update into a closed-form Bernoulli-KL trust region around the clean CFG sampler. ResEdit converts the sampled bits into per-scale continuous-code residuals, gates them with a localization mask, and re-injects them through the generator's native sum-of-scales. Together they couple decision-time bit guidance with combination-time code composition, so masked-out latent features are preserved exactly by code arithmetic while localized, scale-aware edits are applied inside the target region. On PIE-Bench with Infinity-2B, BitResEdit attains the strongest text alignment among same-backbone VAR editors, improving CLIP on the edited region by +1.07 over the strongest prior editor while keeping background preservation competitive with it. Ablations show BitEdit and ResEdit play complementary roles in target alignment and background preservation.

AI.tldr: 提出BitResEdit，一种面向比特级残差VAR生成器的免训练图像编辑框架，通过结合比特级源-负引导(BitEdit)与多尺度残差代码注入(ResEdit)，在保持背景完整性的同时实现了更强的文本对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉自回归(VAR)生成器的文本引导图像编辑方法主要操作于token流、特征或扁平化next-token logits，未能充分利用比特级残差VAR模型的两个原生结构：逐比特Bernoulli预测头和加性多尺度残差代码场，导致编辑的定位精度与背景保持能力受限。
AI.method: BitResEdit包含两个核心模块：BitEdit通过源-负引导，在共享编辑前缀上计算源-目标对比度后倾斜后CFG的逐比特log-odds，并将每次更新投影到清洁CFG采样器周围的闭式Bernoulli-KL信任域内；ResEdit将采样比特转换为每尺度连续代码残差，用定位掩码进行门控，并通过生成器原生的尺度求和机制重新注入，实现掩码外潜在特征的精确保持与掩码内局部尺度感知编辑。
AI.result: 在PIE-Bench数据集上与Infinity-2B骨干网络结合，BitResEdit在同骨干的VAR编辑器中取得了最强的文本对齐效果，编辑区域CLIP分数相比此前最强编辑方法提升+1.07，同时背景保持性能与之相当。消融实验表明BitEdit和ResEdit在目标对齐和背景保持方面发挥互补作用。
AI.conclusion: BitResEdit通过解耦决策时比特引导与组合时代码组合，利用代码算术精确保持掩码外特征，同时实现局部化的尺度感知编辑，为VAR模型的图像编辑提供了利用其原生结构的新范式，揭示了比特级引导与残差代码组合在文本驱动图像编辑中的互补价值。

title: VISA: VLM-Guided Instance Semantic Auditing for 3D Occupancy World Models
summary: Semantic 3D occupancy provides a voxelized world state for autonomous driving and robot decision making, but object and rare-class errors can affect free-space interpretation, collision checking, and temporal state propagation. We show that a common VLM strategy, aligning 3D voxel or object features with crop-caption embeddings, improves text-space similarity without reliably improving closed-set occupancy mIoU. Motivated by this mismatch, we propose VISA, a training-time semantic auditing approach for existing occupancy world models. VISA queries an offline VLM on a representative crop of each physical object instance, obtains a structured audit with class hypotheses, plausible confusions, reliability, attributes, and evidence, and propagates it along the object track. The audit is grounded to matched 3D object voxels and distilled into semantic logits through reliability-weighted taxonomy, attribute-factor, and scene-level audit graph losses, while inference remains unchanged and requires no VLM. On nuScenes, averaged across three runs, VISA improves OccWorld from 19.06 to 20.05 mIoU and GaussianWorld from 21.36 to 21.91 mIoU; on GaussianWorld, object mIoU improves from 18.18 to 19.16 and rare-class mIoU from 15.60 to 16.79. These results suggest that VLMs are better suited to closed-set occupancy as reliability-aware semantic auditors than as generic caption-embedding targets.

AI.tldr: VISA提出了一种训练时语义审计方法，利用离线VLM对占据世界模型中的物体实例进行结构化审计，并通过可靠性加权蒸馏提升闭集语义占据预测的mIoU，表明VLM更适合作为语义审计器而非通用嵌入目标。
AI.motivation: 现有语义3D占据预测中，直接采用VLM策略（对齐3D体素或物体特征与裁剪-字幕嵌入）虽能提升文本空间相似度，但并未可靠改善闭集占据预测的mIoU，尤其物体类和稀有类错误会影响自由空间解释、碰撞检测和时间状态传播，亟需一种能有效利用VLM先验知识提升闭集语义占据精度的方法。
AI.method: VISA在训练时对每个物理物体实例的裁剪区域查询离线VLM，获取包含类别假设、可能混淆项、可靠性、属性和证据的结构化审计结果，并沿物体轨迹传播；将审计结果与匹配的3D物体体素对齐，通过可靠性加权分类损失、属性因子损失和场景级审计图损失蒸馏为语义logits，推理时不依赖VLM且保持原有流程不变。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，VISA将OccWorld的mIoU从19.06提升至20.05，将GaussianWorld的mIoU从21.36提升至21.91；在GaussianWorld上，物体类mIoU从18.18提升至19.16，稀有类mIoU从15.60提升至16.79。
AI.conclusion: VLM在闭集语义占据任务中更适合作为可靠性感知的语义审计器而非通用字幕-嵌入对齐目标，其结构化审计和可靠性加权蒸馏机制能有效提升占据世界模型的语义预测精度，尤其对物体类和稀有类改善显著。

title: Hallucination in Medical Imaging AI: A Cross-Modality Analytical Framework for Taxonomy, Detection, and Mitigation under Regulatory Constraints
summary: AI systems are being deployed across medical imaging faster than their failure modes are understood. At this point in time, the failure of greatest clinical concern is hallucination: clinically plausible but factually incorrect outputs, including fabricated anatomical structures, missed findings, incorrect laterality, and invented measurements in generated reports, with direct consequences, for example, for biopsy decisions, staging, and treatment planning. This structured narrative synthesizes peer-reviewed studies, benchmark datasets, and FDA regulatory guidance across five imaging modalities to produce a cross-modality analysis of hallucination taxonomy, etiology, detection, and mitigation. Specifically, we address three questions in this study: (1) how can existing taxonomies be unified across modalities?, (2) how do medical-specialized foundation models hallucinate less than general-purpose ones?, and (3) which mitigation strategies are effective and compatible with FDA lifecycle oversight? We note that three taxonomic frameworks together cover the imaging pipeline in a way no single framework does alone. We also highlight that general-purpose foundation models outperform medical-specialized models on hallucination-specific benchmarks, indicating that narrow domain fine-tuning can introduce overfitting-induced confabulation. At the same time, the oversight of radiologists remains essential; for instance, a very high percentage of of AI-generated flags required expert correction before clinical use. Physics-informed architectural constraints, Chain-of-Thought prompting, and human-in-the-loop safeguards each address different failure modes and is effective when combined. All findings are mapped to the FDA's Total Product Lifecycle and Predetermined Change Control Plan frameworks, which treat hallucination management as a lifecycle obligation rather than a pre-deployment checklist.

AI.tldr: 本文通过跨模态分析，系统性地研究了医学影像AI系统中的幻觉现象（包括解剖结构虚构、漏诊、侧别错误和测量编造），提出了统一的幻觉分类学，发现通用基础模型在幻觉专用基准上优于医学专用模型，并将幻觉管理映射为FDA全生命周期监管义务而非部署前检查清单。
AI.motivation: AI系统在医学影像中的部署速度超过了对其失效模式的理解速度，其中临床最关注的失效模式是幻觉——即生成临床上看似合理但事实上错误的输出，包括虚构解剖结构、遗漏发现、错误侧别和编造的测量值，这些错误会直接影响活检决策、分期和治疗规划。现有研究缺乏跨模态的统一分析框架，无法系统性地对幻觉的分类学、病因、检测和缓解策略进行整合。
AI.method: 本文采用结构化叙述综述方法，整合了同行评审研究、基准数据集和FDA监管指南，覆盖五种成像模态（未具体列出），构建了跨模态的幻觉分析。研究通过统一现有分类学框架、对比通用基础模型与医学专用基础模型在幻觉专用基准上的表现，以及评估物理约束架构、思维链提示和人机协同等缓解策略，并将所有发现映射到FDA的Total Product Lifecycle和Predetermined Change Control Plan框架中。
AI.result: 研究发现三种分类学框架单独均无法完整覆盖成像管线，需联合使用；通用基础模型在幻觉专用基准上优于医学专用模型，表明窄领域的微调可能引入由过拟合导致的虚构（confabulation）；极高比例的AI生成标记需要放射科专家修正后才能用于临床；物理约束架构、思维链提示和人机协同各自针对不同的失效模式，且组合使用时效果最佳。
AI.conclusion: 本文的核心启示在于：幻觉管理不应被视为部署前的一次性检查清单，而应作为贯穿FDA全生命周期的持续性义务；通用模型在幻觉鲁棒性上可能优于医学专用模型，提示领域微调可能带来过拟合风险；放射科医生的监督不可替代；多种缓解策略需组合使用以覆盖不同失效模式。

title: Reward Modeling for Multi-Agent Orchestration
summary: Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) built on Large Language Models (LLMs) require effective orchestration to coordinate specialized agents, yet training such orchestrators is hindered by limited supervision and high computational cost. We propose Orchestration Reward Modeling (OrchRM), a self-supervised framework for evaluating orchestration quality without human annotations. OrchRM leverages intermediate artifacts from multi-agent executions to construct win-lose pairs for Bradley-Terry reward model training. Unlike existing MAS test-time scaling and orchestrator training frameworks that rely on costly sub-agent rollouts, OrchRM operates directly at the orchestration level, enabling efficient and high-performing reward-guided orchestrator training and MAS test-time scaling. OrchRM improves training efficiency by up to 10x in token usage while improving MAS test-time scaling performance by up to 8% in accuracy. These gains consistently transfer across multiple domains, including mathematical reasoning, web-based question answering, and multi-hop reasoning, demonstrating orchestration-level reward modeling as a scalable direction for robust multi-agent orchestration. Code will be available at https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/OrchRM.

AI.tldr: 提出OrchRM框架，通过构建多智能体执行过程中的中间产物作为胜负对来训练Bradley-Terry奖励模型，实现无需人工标注的编排质量评估，从而高效指导多智能体系统的编排器训练和测试时缩放。
AI.motivation: 基于大语言模型的多智能体系统需要有效的编排机制来协调专业智能体，但编排器的训练面临监督信号稀缺和计算成本高昂的双重挑战，现有方法依赖昂贵的子智能体 rollout，缺乏高效的编排质量评估手段。
AI.method: 提出OrchRM自监督框架，利用多智能体执行过程中产生的中间产物构建胜负对，基于Bradley-Terry模型训练奖励模型；该奖励模型直接在编排层面运作，无需子智能体 rollout，同时支持奖励引导的编排器训练和测试时缩放。
AI.result: 在数学推理、网页问答和多跳推理等多个领域，OrchRM在训练效率上提升高达10倍（token使用量），MAS测试时缩放准确率提升高达8%，且增益在不同领域间一致迁移。
AI.conclusion: 编排级别的奖励建模是一种可扩展的多智能体编排方向，能够在不依赖人工标注和昂贵rollout的情况下实现高效、高性能的编排器训练与测试时缩放。

title: What's Old is New Again: Classical Dimensionality Reduction for Efficient Saliency-Guided Biometric Attack Detection
comment: 16 pages (8 main, 2 references, 6 appendix), 4 figures (3 main, 1 appendix), 13 tables (3 main, 10 appendix)
summary: Saliency-guided training is a paradigm in visual recognition that encourages models to focus on the most relevant image regions during learning. While its application in biometric presentation attack detection (PAD) has shown strong benefits in robustness and generalization, adoption is often limited by the high cost, domain specificity, and limited scalability of existing saliency acquisition methods, such as human annotations over a limited dataset. We present a novel, cost-efficient, and highly-scalable approach to saliency acquisition using maps inspired by classical dimensionality reduction techniques: PCA and LDA. Our proposed methods generate saliency maps directly from raw training data, requiring no human annotation nor domain knowledge. We contextualize the effectiveness of these saliency sources in three saliency-explored domains (iris PAD, synthetic face detection, fingerprint PAD) and demonstrate its scalability in two saliency-novel domains (fingerprint vein PAD and ID card PAD). Across all domains tested, models trained using dimensionality reduction-sourced saliency maps exceed baseline and sometimes SOTA saliency methods without any resource investment or domain-specific tooling. Our findings overcome an important yet unaddressed barrier to saliency-guided training for biometric attack detection and beyond.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于经典降维技术（PCA和LDA）的低成本、高可扩展性的显著性图生成方法，无需人工标注或领域知识即可直接从训练数据中获取显著性信息，并在多种生物特征呈现攻击检测（PAD）任务中显著提升模型性能，克服了显著性引导训练在实际部署中的关键障碍。
AI.motivation: 显著性引导训练在生物特征呈现攻击检测（PAD）中已被证明能有效提升模型鲁棒性和泛化能力，但其实际应用受限于现有显著性获取方法的高成本、领域特异性及有限可扩展性——例如人工标注不仅昂贵且仅适用于有限数据集，难以在大规模和多领域场景下推广。
AI.method: 本文提出利用经典降维技术PCA（主成分分析）和LDA（线性判别分析）直接从原始训练数据中生成显著性图，该方法完全无需人工标注或任何领域知识；通过PCA/LDA对数据分布进行建模，投影方向反映了最具判别性或方差最大的特征，进而构建出与任务相关的显著性热图，用于引导模型训练。
AI.result: 在三个已有显著性探索的领域（虹膜PAD、合成人脸检测、指纹PAD）中，所提方法的性能超越了基线方法，有时甚至优于现有最先进的显著性方法；同时在两个显著性全新的领域（指纹静脉PAD和身份证PAD）中验证了其强大可扩展性；所有实验均表明，基于降维显著性图的模型无需任何资源投入或领域特定工具即可取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 本研究表明，基于PCA和LDA的自动化显著性图生成方法能够以零额外成本有效替代传统高成本的显著性获取方式，解除了显著性引导训练在生物特征攻击检测及其他视觉识别任务中广泛部署的关键瓶颈，具有重要的实践意义和推广价值。

title: EPIG: Emotion-Based Prompting for Personalised Image Generation
comment: Submitted to arXiv. 20 pages, 4 figures. Work on emotion-based prompt engineering for text-to-image diffusion models with applications in personalized image generation
summary:
Text-to-image diffusion models have achieved impressive results in synthesizing high-quality images from natural language prompts. However, commonly used prompting strategies remain relatively generic, limiting the model's ability to accurately express emotional intent and nuanced affective attributes.
  This work proposes EPIG, a method that enhances emotional expressiveness at the prompt level prior to image generation. Grounded in psychologically informed emotion representations (valence-arousal) and leveraging structured, role-aware prompt enrichment, EPIG enriches emotion-related components of prompts without modifying or retraining the image generation backbone.
  The resulting emotion-aware prompts guide the generative process toward more emotionally coherent visual outputs, with particular effectiveness in controlling arousal. EPIG is lightweight, training-free, and well suited for resource-constrained and personalized image generation scenarios.
  Experimental results on a benchmark of 10 diverse prompts show that EPIG reduces mean arousal error compared to strong baselines, including naive insertion and LLM-based prompt expansion, with reductions of 14% and 12%, respectively. These improvements are statistically significant. EPIG also preserves valence alignment and semantic consistency, as measured by CLIPScore and supported by ablation studies.
  The effect is more pronounced on prompts containing explicit subjects such as humans, children, or animals, where the reduction reaches 17%, highlighting the subject-sensitive behavior of the proposed method.

AI.tldr: EPIG是一种轻量级、无需训练的提示增强方法，基于心理学中的效价-唤醒度情感表征和角色感知的结构化提示丰富策略，在文本到图像扩散模型生成前提升提示的情感表现力，在保持语义一致性的前提下显著降低生成图像的平均唤醒度误差。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型虽能生成高质量图像，但常用的提示策略较为通用，难以准确表达情感意图和细微的情感属性，导致生成图像在情感表达方面存在不足，缺乏对情感维度（如唤醒度）的有效控制手段。
AI.method: EPIG方法在图像生成之前对提示进行情感增强，基于心理学中的效价-唤醒度（valence-arousal）情感表征理论，结合结构化、角色感知的提示丰富策略，有针对性地增强提示中的情感相关成分，不修改或重新训练图像生成主干模型。
AI.result: 在包含10个多样化提示的基准测试上，EPIG将平均唤醒度误差相比朴素插入方法和基于LLM的提示扩展方法分别降低了14%和12%，差异具有统计学显著性；在包含人类、儿童或动物等显式主体的提示上效果更为显著，误差降低达17%；同时通过CLIPScore和消融实验验证了效价对齐和语义一致性得到保持。
AI.conclusion: EPIG提供了一种轻量级、无需训练且适用于资源受限和个性化图像生成场景的情感控制方案，在控制唤醒度方面尤为有效，并且该方法对提示中显式主体具有敏感性，为情感可控的文本到图像生成提供了实用且有效的提示级干预途径。

title: ERTS: Adversarial Robustness Testing of Ethical AI via Semantic Perturbation in a Bounded Consequence Space
summary: As AI systems are deployed in high-stakes ethical contexts such as healthcare triage, autonomous vehicle control, and employment screening, formal methods for evaluating their robustness against adversarial manipulation of ethical reasoning remain underdeveloped. This paper introduces the Ethical Robustness Testing System (ERTS), a closed-pipeline framework that: (1) encodes ethical dilemmas into a 22-dimensional Ethical Consequence Space (ECS) grounded in established ethical theory; (2) applies 17 semantic perturbation functions subject to 6 validity constraint classes including a novel semantic coherence constraint; (3) measures decision deviation via a 4-component Ethical Instability Index (EII); and (4) produces domain-adaptive pre-deployment robustness assessment verdicts. We evaluate 4 structured baseline models and 2 production LLMs (Gemini 2.0 Flash and Llama 3.2) across 50 ethical scenarios spanning 8 deployment domains, generating 1,500 adversarial test cases. Results demonstrate that only 33% of models achieve assessment clearance, with the local Llama-3.2 model proving particularly vulnerable to fairness corruption and information degradation attacks (ERS = 0.737). To the best of our knowledge, no existing framework combines a bounded ethical consequence space, semantic coherence constraints, and domain-adaptive assessment in a single adversarial testing pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出伦理鲁棒性测试系统（ERTS），一个将伦理困境编码为22维伦理后果空间、应用17种语义扰动函数并采用伦理不稳定性指数（EII）评估的对抗测试框架，实验发现仅33%的模型通过评估，Llama-3.2在公平性腐败和信息退化攻击下表现尤为脆弱。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统在高风险伦理场景（如医疗分诊、自动驾驶、就业筛选）中的部署日益广泛，但针对伦理推理进行对抗性操控的鲁棒性评估方法仍缺乏系统性框架，现有工作未能将受限伦理后果空间、语义一致性约束与领域自适应评估整合为统一的对抗测试流水线。
AI.method: ERTS框架包含四个核心组件：(1)将伦理困境编码为基于经典伦理理论的22维伦理后果空间（ECS）；(2)应用17种语义扰动函数，受6类有效性约束（含新型语义一致性约束）限制；(3)通过4分量伦理不稳定性指数（EII）量化决策偏离；(4)生成领域自适应的预部署鲁棒性评估结论。实验涉及4个结构化基线模型和2个生产级LLM（Gemini 2.0 Flash和Llama 3.2），覆盖50个伦理场景、8个部署领域，生成1500个对抗测试用例。
AI.result: 仅33%的模型通过评估审查，本地部署的Llama-3.2模型在公平性腐败和信息退化攻击下尤为脆弱，其伦理鲁棒性得分（ERS）仅为0.737。
AI.conclusion: ERTS提供了一个系统化、可扩展的伦理鲁棒性评估框架，揭示了当前主流LLM在对抗性伦理测试中的显著脆弱性，对AI系统在高风险伦理场景中的安全部署具有重要启示意义。
